subject: Help me defend our health care.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890385/7f51f7bc/4c99ad96/4ef132d0/4241140753/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter,

After nearly two decades in Washington, one thing is plain to see -- you can trust Senator Cornyn to side with the pharmaceutical companies and the insurance industry over his constituents.

I will always side with Texans. **That 's why I'm running against Sen. Cornyn.** In the Senate, I'll protect our health care and fight for a public option so EVERYONE can get the health care they need.

**[Will you stand with me in this fight for our health care by contributing today? Even $1 will make a difference.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890385/7f51f7bc/4c99ad96/4ef132d7/4241140753/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExNzEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200406.3nd__1171__&amount=10&recurring=true")** **While Senator Cornyn spends a lot of time _talking_ about wanting to reduce the cost of prescription drugs, his _actions_ paint a completely different picture.** He took hundreds of thousands of dollars from Big Pharma and then turned around and voted against a bipartisan bill that would have lowered the cost of prescription drugs. | Senator Cornyn has worked hand-in-hand with Mitch McConnell to:
1. Gut protections for _millions_ of Texans with pre-existing conditions
2. Allow insurance companies to charge older Texans _more_ for coverage

---
**[If you think it's time that Texans have a senator who will defend their health care and work to improve it (not tear it down), donate $1 to my campaign today.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890385/7f51f7bc/4c99ad96/4ef132d7/4241140753/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExNzEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200406.3nd__1171__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

Senator Cornyn is just another politician in the pockets of corporate PACs. He's forgotten who he was elected to serve: the people of Texas.

I know Texans aren't afraid to fight for what we believe in. I don't believe in backing down from tough fights -- but I need you on this one, Peter.

**Join my team today by making a quick donation -- even $1 will make a difference. Help me defend our health care.**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $1>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890385/7f51f7bc/4c99ad96/4ef132d6/4241140753/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExNzEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200406.3nd__1171__&amount=1")**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890385/7f51f7bc/4c99ad96/4ef132d4/4241140753/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExNzEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200406.3nd__1171__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890385/7f51f7bc/4c99ad96/4ef132ca/4241140753/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExNzEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200406.3nd__1171__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890385/7f51f7bc/4c99ad96/4ef132c8/4241140753/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExNzEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200406.3nd__1171__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890385/7f51f7bc/4c99ad96/4ef132ce/4241140753/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExNzEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200406.3nd__1171__")**
Thanks,
MJ

**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890385/7f51f7bc/4c99ad96/4ef132d7/4241140753/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExNzEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200406.3nd__1171__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890385/7f51f7bc/4c99ad96/4ef132cd/4241140753/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExNzEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1171&amount=10&recurring=true")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890385/7f51f7bc/4c99ad96/4ef132c2/4241140753/VEsHBA/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

name: Christy Smith
subject: What good leadership looks like >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | _The number one priority during this time is to make sure everyone helps mitigate the spread of COVID-19 in California and across the country. Our campaign is doing our part by canceling all in-person events, moving to a digital operation, and supporting local efforts to help those in need. Emails like this are a critical part of our ability to run a strong campaign that can win._
Peter,

This crisis shows the importance of good leadership.

Some leaders (from both sides of the aisle) in states across the country have reacted quickly to the pandemic and have therefore been able to mitigate some of the impacts. Just today, California announced we're lending 500 state-owned ventilators to the national stockpile. They are headed for hard-hit states like New York, Michigan, and Louisiana.

**We could do that because our leaders in California took early and decisive action, saving countless lives right here in California. And now, thanks to these ventilators, they're saving lives in other states, too.**

Meanwhile, the president and Republicans leaders in Congress have held up critical legislation, repeatedly undermined the credibility of medical professionals, and provided mixed messaging at the absolute worst time. I mean, what are folks supposed to think when Trump says that wearing a medical mask helps to prevent the spread of the virus but also says he won't wear one?

Our elected leaders should always be providing clear-eyed guidance, lifting each other up, and offering not just compassion and care, but also solutions and ideas when times are tough.

**[I will be that leader in the House, but I need your help to get there. Can you pitch in $5 or whatever you can afford at this time to help me be a voice for our district? Our special election is in just 5 short weeks.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8c1/29776869/a0ba906/569f48e9/3091299364/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MDZfd2hpY2hsZWFkZXItZnVsbCJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200406_whichleader-full")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8c1/29776869/a0ba906/569f48ea/3091299364/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MDZfd2hpY2hsZWFkZXItZnVsbCJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200406_whichleader-full&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8c1/29776869/a0ba906/569f48eb/3091299364/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MDZfd2hpY2hsZWFkZXItZnVsbCJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200406_whichleader-full&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---|---
[Express Donate $50](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8c1/29776869/a0ba906/569f48e4/3091299364/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MDZfd2hpY2hsZWFkZXItZnVsbCJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200406_whichleader-full&express_lane=true&amount=50") | [Express Donate $100](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8c1/29776869/a0ba906/569f48e5/3091299364/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MDZfd2hpY2hsZWFkZXItZnVsbCJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200406_whichleader-full&express_lane=true&amount=100")
[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8c1/29776869/a0ba906/569f48e6/3091299364/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MDZfd2hpY2hsZWFkZXItZnVsbCJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200406_whichleader-full&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8c1/29776869/a0ba906/569f48e9/3091299364/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MDZfd2hpY2hsZWFkZXItZnVsbCJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200406_whichleader-full")
**I was definitely not anticipating running for office in the midst of a crisis of this magnitude, but it's been a powerful reminder that we need to elect the right leaders.**

Thanks so much for your support, Peter. I promise I am working every day to help provide the solutions we need -- so don't ever hesitate to reach out to [info@christyforcongress.org](mailto:info@christyforcongress.org) with any questions or ideas.

**[And if you are able to at this time, can you chip in $5 or more so I keep fighting in Washington?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8c1/29776869/a0ba906/569f48e9/3091299364/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MDZfd2hpY2hsZWFkZXItZnVsbCJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200406_whichleader-full")**

Stay safe.

\-- Christy
[DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8c1/29776869/a0ba906/569f48e9/3091299364/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MDZfd2hpY2hsZWFkZXItZnVsbCJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200406_whichleader-full")

name: Dr. Manny Sethi
subject: Check-Up with Dr. Manny 4/6
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved
body:
[](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhkrmiy-olhhkyhhid-y/)
---
| |
---|---|---
| Friends, This pandemic has shown me the resilience of our citizens. I'm so proud to call myself a Tennessean and have seen incredible work being done all around to fight this virus. I know you are worried about your safety or the health of your loved ones during this pandemic. If you need to talk to someone about this or you want to ask me a question, please call me at 615-200-7195. Additionally, you can email me directly at Manny@drmannyforsenate.com It saddens me to hear about so many people who have been affected by this virus. Many folks are still sick, unemployed, or need our help! **Would you consider donating to these non-profits doing awesome work in our state? ** Feeding America has launched the COVID-19 Response Fund, a national food and fundraising effort to support people facing hunger and the food banks who help them. They are working with government leaders to ensure the emergency response includes strong support and flexibility for federal nutrition programs including the School Lunch Program. [FEEDING AMERICA](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhkrmiy-olhhkyhhid-j/) Second Harvest Food Bank of East Tennessee is one of many Second Harvest food banks working to supply food locally. As more Tennesseans file for unemployment, more people are likely to go hungry. [SECOND HARVEST FOOD BANK OF EAST TENNESSEE](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhkrmiy-olhhkyhhid-t/) The Community Foundation, in partnership with the City of Memphis and several other local leadership institutions, launched the Mid-South COVID-19 Regional Response Fund to provide immediate resources for triage and recovery resources to ensure community resilience. [COMMUNITY FOUNDATION OF MEMPHIS](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhkrmiy-olhhkyhhid-i/) The Tennessee Region of the American Red Cross serves all 95 counties in Tennessee. Right now in this pandemic many folks are going to need donated blood. My wife Maya and I have donated and I encourage you to do so as well. [RED CROSS](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhkrmiy-olhhkyhhid-d/) Northside Neighborhood House promotes the independence of residents in Chattanooga by providing a hand up through education and assistance. They help folks with paying bills, provide education to children, and even operate a thrift store [NORTHSIDE NEIGHBORHOOD HOUSE](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhkrmiy-olhhkyhhid-h/) I would greatly appreciate anything you can pitch in for any of these fine organizations or others you may know. This is a difficult time for everyone, but we will come together to beat this! Please continue to pray for our state and our country as we go through this tumultuous time. All the best, Dr. Manny P.S. I hope you'll tune in to my [Virtual Town Halls on Facebook ](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhkrmiy-olhhkyhhid-k/)on [Tuesday](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhkrmiy-olhhkyhhid-u/) and [Thursday](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhkrmiy-olhhkyhhid-o/) to hear exactly why we must send a conservative outsider to represent us in Washington. Copyright © 2019 Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved.
Our mailing address is:
PO Box 58068, Nashville, TN 37205 |
| |
| |
---|---|---

[](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhkrmiy-olhhkyhhid-n/) [](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhkrmiy-olhhkyhhid-x/) [](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhkrmiy-olhhkyhhid-m/)

name: Lauren Ganapini
subject: Vote-by-mail election…in Indiana (seriously)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party
body:
| | | |
---|---
| | **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16975906/180917076/1745149176?refcode=VBM1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDNmOWI1Yi1iMzc4LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P6HKDH_7Jgvgf3LIbIHBiD-3M4IqhoPSrd1a0s3-QO0=)** That’s right. For the first time, EVERY SINGLE HOOSIER voter can vote by mail in the June 2 primary election, if they choose. That’s huge because Hoosiers shouldn’t have to put their health at risk to exercise their right to vote. But there’s a catch. To date, Republicans haven’t agreed to mail every voter an application to receive their ballot at home. name: Nina Ahmad
subject: Support Those on the Front Lines
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina for PA
body:
| |
---
**My promise as a proud and anxious M****om** As we prepare for the worst week of the COVID-19 crisis so far, this is a tense time for all of of us. It is especially scary for the healthcare and first responder communities who are serving on the front lines of this pandemic, and for their families. In these difficult times, it has been amazing to watch so many people from every background and every walk of life step-up to help their neighbors and their communities. I am especially proud of, and worried for, one young activist in particular, my daughter, Joya Ahmad. Late last week, the work of Joya and her colleagues at Medical Supply Drive was highlighted by NBC 4 in New York. The mission of Medical Supply Drive is to provide personal protective equipment to the healthcare workers around the country who desperately need it. [Click here to read the full article.](https://act.myngp.com/el/LC-9SVsbCvbuV0uOpHYdHf98n2VEYagYgO_sgBQTirk=/jq4jndIJfjs9Im-rAjIHQNqdu7BqfXX0QfmyP9qwdFU=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/LC-9SVsbCvbuV0uOpHYdHf98n2VEYagYgO_sgBQTirk=/jq4jndIJfjs9Im-rAjIHQNqdu7BqfXX0QfmyP9qwdFU=) Photo Credit: Medical Supply drive NYC As the Northeast Region Coordinator, Joya represents the epicenter of the crisis, and the shortage in PPE, New York City. I could not be more proud of her for stepping-up during the crisis, and I worry deeply about her everyday. I know that there are so many like her who have stepped up to help their communities in countless ways. As a scientist, I have seen before first-hand how small, courageous actions can turn-the-tide against the worst epidemics. Here in Pennsylvania, Gov. Wolf and Secretary of Health Dr. Rachel Levine continue to do an admirable job leading our Commonwealth and its citizens through this crisis. Unfortunately, we do not have that leadership in the White House. As a result, the lives of countless Americans have been put at risk due to a lack of preparation and a failure of leadership. As Auditor General, my job is about accountability. When this crisis is over, I pledge to you that I will use the power of my office to do all I can to hold those responsible for the mishandling of this crisis accountable, and I will do everything possible to make sure that we are prepared for the next crisis when it comes. **[Please consider making a contribution to my campaign so that I can go to Harrisburg to fulfill my promise of action and accountability to Pennsylvania.](https://act.myngp.com/el/LC-9SVsbCvbuV0uOpHYdHf98n2VEYagYgO_sgBQTirk=/yTelh6Ng-k5IFeBdhlcUOx8TO9CLiwdPl-s2UiCk55U=)** In the meantime, join me in applauding and supporting all of those who are serving on the front lines and helping their communities during this crisis. Learn more by visiting our website: [**_www.NinaForPA.com_**](https://act.myngp.com/el/LC-9SVsbCvbuV0uOpHYdHf98n2VEYagYgO_sgBQTirk=/UCsEqgXsaRYS9POuGSjhAHp1foXju4xY3-QazcgVR3o=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/LC-9SVsbCvbuV0uOpHYdHf98n2VEYagYgO_sgBQTirk=/yTelh6Ng-k5IFeBdhlcUOx8TO9CLiwdPl-s2UiCk55U=) Follow us on Social Media: ** ** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/LC-9SVsbCvbuV0uOpHYdHf98n2VEYagYgO_sgBQTirk=/vhU2xMdgAqKK7bSx2iBd8nZX3OGFR4hz9fqDGcG3UPI=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/LC-9SVsbCvbuV0uOpHYdHf98n2VEYagYgO_sgBQTirk=/zCePN4Un8Kb9fRo1epv3LSNoolxu60gVixN0mG_hDH8=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/LC-9SVsbCvbuV0uOpHYdHf98n2VEYagYgO_sgBQTirk=/Ox1Qaz2r6Wv6gZ8KfXkKOnYqvce5LD5eYhR6pxze1ZU=?hl=en)

name: Charles Booker
subject: The real Democrat in the race:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
It’s time to send real Democrats to Washington.
#
I’ve always believed that the Democratic Party is the party of the people -- of change and progress in the face of adversity. That’s why I proudly ran on the Democratic ticket for the Kentucky State House back in 2018, and why I’m running as a Democrat in this race for U.S. Senate.
**And in this race, I’m proud to be running for U.S. Senate as the only _real_ Democrat. **We’re proud to be the only campaign in this race fighting for truly progressive change, like passing Medicare for All, guaranteeing a Universal Basic Income, and enacting a Green New Deal. I can’t speak to why the other candidates in this race aren’t willing to fight for these solutions, but I can assure you that I will -- and that I’m the only one.
**[Can you join me in the fight for _real_ Democratic values to be represented in this race and contribute $5 or whatever you can to my campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16987180/181035386/-1771148989?refcode=em20200407&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDc2ZmRhYi1lNDc4LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UJlshe8i5GZsJbyiQTGFW31HBvSfEn4GRgfCB9QcMZk=)**
****[Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16987181/181035388/-1771148989?refcode=em20200407&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDc2ZmRhYi1lNDc4LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UJlshe8i5GZsJbyiQTGFW31HBvSfEn4GRgfCB9QcMZk=)****
Somewhere along the way, it seems members of the Democratic establishment have forgotten what the party is all about. **These are not the real Democratic values that you and I know -- and they aren’t real Democrats.** But I am, and I will fight for you and your loved ones when I become your next Senator.

clean_body: It’s time to send real Democrats to Washington. I’ve always believed that the Democratic Party is the party of the people -- of change and progress in the face of adversity. That’s why I proudly ran on the Democratic ticket for the Kentucky State House back in 2018, and why I’m running as a Democrat in this race for U.S. Senate. And in this race, I’m proud to be running for U.S. Senate as the only real Democrat. We’re proud to be the only campaign in this race fighting for truly progressive change, like passing Medicare for All, guaranteeing a Universal Basic Income, and enacting a Green New Deal. I can’t speak to why the other candidates in this race aren’t willing to fight for these solutions, but I can assure you that I will -- and that I’m the only one. = **= Somewhere along the way, it seems members of the Democratic establishment have forgotten what the party is all about. Just like the Republicans that they disparage, the Democratic establishment takes money from corporate interests...all while arguing against canceling student loan debt, Medicare for All, and a Green New Deal. These are not the real Democratic values that you and I know -- and they aren’t real Democrats. But I am, and I will fight for you and your loved ones when I become your next Senator. = = Mitch McConnell has held office since 1984. He has handily won re-election five times. It’s a tried and true fact that the Democratic establishment playbook cannot kick him out, no matter how many chances they get. We cannot let another milquetoast Democrat clinch the nomination and set ourselves up to lose for a sixth time \-- and have another six years of Mitch McConnell. We need everyone in our grassroots movement to step up to the establishment to say: no more. It’s time to send real Democrats to Washington. = In solidarity, Charles =** | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: =?utf-8?Q?Sean=20Spicer?=
subject: Big Announcement!
body:
My new book, “Leading America” is available for pre-order now! | |
---
| | | [ ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=a759f168ef&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
| | | | | | [](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=bd3b4d16c0&e=f6564bbe3b) | [Share](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=544fe99675&e=f6564bbe3b)
---|---
| | [](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=9ca44013b7&e=f6564bbe3b) | [Tweet](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=f61dfa3ab5&e=f6564bbe3b)
---|---
| [ ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=865d795bd2&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
| | My publisher officially announced today that my second book, “[Leading America: President Trump’s Commitment to People, Patriotism, and Capitalism](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=785d5a575b&e=f6564bbe3b),” will be published on October 13, 2020.

It will be released on October 13, 2020, but you can pre-order it now [HERE](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=2dc86abf56&e=f6564bbe3b).
---
| In the book I write about the job President Trump has done facing the challenges of his first term, from impeachment and relentless attacks from mainstream media to the sudden outbreak of coronavirus. Conservatives have always faced enormous headwinds from the media, Hollywood, academia and big tech, but the resistance to this Administration has taken it to new heights, even during a crisis. Leading America will expose the reality and hypocrisy of each and how the President’s policies and agenda are fighting back.
---
| | If you are a member of a group or club that would be interested in a having a book event in the fall click [HERE](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=e9a3fb341c&e=f6564bbe3b).
---
| __________________________
---
|
---
| |
#### Latest on Spicer&Co

We have had several great segments on Spicer&Co — just yesterday we had [Bishop Michael Burbidge and Rabbi Shmuley Boteach discuss](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=33928beffb&e=f6564bbe3b) how to balance faith and social distancing during this Holy Weeks for both christians and jews. We also recently had [Robert Herjavec from Shark Tank and his wife Kym](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=a9358296fa&e=f6564bbe3b) on to share how they are handling working from home with two young children.
Please subscribe to my [YouTube channel here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=6aeef6c119&e=f6564bbe3b), and hit the notification button so you don’t miss any of the interviews.
---
|
---
| [ ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=6faaa78c03&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
One of our favorite segments each week, “Meme of the Week” with our friend from Turning Point USA, Benny Johnson. Check out this weeks for some #TigerKing content.
| [ ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=f5b29f52a1&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
We had on Alice Marie Johnson, a recipient of a presidential pardon from President Trump, and Mark Holden, SVP of Stand Together to discuss the impact of coronavirus of Americans in prison.
| I hope you and your families stay healthy during the coronavirus outbreak.

Stay safe,

_Sean_

name: Senate Conservatives via Todd Young (R-IN)
subject: Senate Republicans are waiting for your response
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF TODD YOUNG, INC
body:
Record your response and let President Trump and Senate Republicans like Todd Young (R-IN) know that you support their pro-growth, America-First legislation. Your response is critical to shaping how Senate Republicans like Todd Young can further help to keep the Majority this upcoming November.
Friend,

Have you taken a second to record your responses in the Official 2020 Voter Contact Survey? body:
Friend, For the past few days, I've been receiving intelligence that Texas Democrats are plotting historic attacks against me and President Trump.
Historic in the fact that they will spend record amounts - millions upon millions!
And historic in the fact that they will be more aggressive than EVER.
Now, Friend, I have an update for you.
These attacks have already begun.
**[But I've just learned that it's not just Texas Democrats that are focused on unseating me and President Trump - national leftist groups from around the nation are turning their sights on Texas!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LR9yFugw7EzCVRu1FRUqOiZnkrPdBI0vmjyrzo6HQyoUo4lkeZtXu96fxDeB4s08DTbj4XL_Zdhj9uSLaYV2Pw9HUAtO2GcKh2wA_KJQT2sYt_DXGtDRocVE5luZshxBo0xi-q9WO17b1MRRijTxVPN6Pegrn2JIv6pNWZ5iRCKa8wKK6yfCgv3FWdU8q812EKgiq0Sp-9t5QUsQKqwqFz70Q0BHH_6RLuXaWgfmwH8KE7M_BKexvfvdaf3r9wxJnCC1aeOiE9_77H0XptiQ8RV24RN6Tcv2uxOIeeiEEq7lnAC2gPCKt-hjjUCr5Sbi7clM3A3GjZ-JI3HYxOxJe1F75OW97PgQQEa1-HeWp7WgrGlxbN4QYg==&c=SvoQamG3TgVYkxq1bODiFkjA3Zf6TjK0Wt1q6RT4KXPaDgH903OSpg==&ch=QBtR4QQvyPPQED4rC0wVY1eHWyXwy5T7T9C_DhKt_cJbJw8fjQT1hQ==)**
I need your help IMMEDIATELY to make sure we have what it takes to fight back. **RESPONSE DEFENSE FUND** Email: [$SUBSCRIBER.EMAIL](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LR9yFugw7EzCVRu1FRUqOiZnkrPdBI0vmjyrzo6HQyoUo4lkeZtXu96fxDeB4s08DTbj4XL_Zdhj9uSLaYV2Pw9HUAtO2GcKh2wA_KJQT2sYt_DXGtDRocVE5luZshxBo0xi-q9WO17b1MRRijTxVPN6Pegrn2JIv6pNWZ5iRCKa8wKK6yfCgv3FWdU8q812EKgiq0Sp-9t5QUsQKqwqFz70Q0BHH_6RLuXaWgfmwH8KE7M_BKexvfvdaf3r9wxJnCC1aeOiE9_77H0XptiQ8RV24RN6Tcv2uxOIeeiEEq7lnAC2gPCKt-hjjUCr5Sbi7clM3A3GjZ-JI3HYxOxJe1F75OW97PgQhPImLTyA0RsZlYovcRBUxA==&c=SvoQamG3TgVYkxq1bODiFkjA3Zf6TjK0Wt1q6RT4KXPaDgH903OSpg==&ch=QBtR4QQvyPPQED4rC0wVY1eHWyXwy5T7T9C_DhKt_cJbJw8fjQT1hQ==) Needed to Defend Texas: **$51,472** [ **CONTRIBUTE** ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LR9yFugw7EzCVRu1FRUqOiZnkrPdBI0vmjyrzo6HQyoUo4lkeZtXu96fxDeB4s08DTbj4XL_Zdhj9uSLaYV2Pw9HUAtO2GcKh2wA_KJQT2sYt_DXGtDRocVE5luZshxBo0xi-q9WO17b1MRRijTxVPN6Pegrn2JIv6pNWZ5iRCKa8wKK6yfCgv3FWdU8q812EKgiq0Sp-9t5QUsQKqwqFz70Q0BHH_6RLuXaWgfmwH8KE7M_BKexvfvdaf3r9wxJnCC1aeOiE9_77H0XptiQ8RV24RN6Tcv2uxOIeeiEEq7lnAC2gPCKt-hjjUCr5Sbi7clM3A3GjZ-JI3HYxOxJe1F75OW97PgQxW-dLVyufhPB_OrIKMrMSA==&c=SvoQamG3TgVYkxq1bODiFkjA3Zf6TjK0Wt1q6RT4KXPaDgH903OSpg==&ch=QBtR4QQvyPPQED4rC0wVY1eHWyXwy5T7T9C_DhKt_cJbJw8fjQT1hQ==) If we fail to take action immediately, how will we possibly recover?
**[This is crucial, Friend. Will you stand with me right now?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LR9yFugw7EzCVRu1FRUqOiZnkrPdBI0vmjyrzo6HQyoUo4lkeZtXu96fxDeB4s08DTbj4XL_Zdhj9uSLaYV2Pw9HUAtO2GcKh2wA_KJQT2sYt_DXGtDRocVE5luZshxBo0xi-q9WO17b1MRRijTxVPN6Pegrn2JIv6pNWZ5iRCKa8wKK6yfCgv3FWdU8q812EKgiq0Sp-9t5QUsQKqwqFz70Q0BHH_6RLuXaWgfmwH8KE7M_BKexvfvdaf3r9wxJnCC1aeOiE9_77H0XptiQ8RV24RN6Tcv2uxOIeeiEEq7lnAC2gPCKt-hjjUCr5Sbi7clM3A3GjZ-JI3HYxOxJe1F75OW97PgQs9QXGfasdfSH56gNbCGLjQ==&c=SvoQamG3TgVYkxq1bODiFkjA3Zf6TjK0Wt1q6RT4KXPaDgH903OSpg==&ch=QBtR4QQvyPPQED4rC0wVY1eHWyXwy5T7T9C_DhKt_cJbJw8fjQT1hQ==)**
We can't sit idle while the Democrats set their plan in motion.
I know I can count on you to make sure failure isn't even an option. [ **CHIP IN $25 >>** ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LR9yFugw7EzCVRu1FRUqOiZnkrPdBI0vmjyrzo6HQyoUo4lkeZtXu96fxDeB4s08DTbj4XL_Zdhj9uSLaYV2Pw9HUAtO2GcKh2wA_KJQT2sYt_DXGtDRocVE5luZshxBo0xi-q9WO17b1MRRijTxVPN6Pegrn2JIv6pNWZ5iRCKa8wKK6yfCgv3FWdU8q812EKgiq0Sp-9t5QUsQKqwqFz70Q0BHH_6RLuXaWgfmwH8KE7M_BKexvfvdaf3r9wxJnCC1aeOiE9_77H0XptiQ8RV24RN6Tcv2uxOIeeiEEq7lnAC2gPCKt-hjjUCr5Sbi7clM3A3GjZ-JI3HYxOxJe1F75OW97PgQFpvdvnI9sRXEO6CXbFcR4w==&c=SvoQamG3TgVYkxq1bODiFkjA3Zf6TjK0Wt1q6RT4KXPaDgH903OSpg==&ch=QBtR4QQvyPPQED4rC0wVY1eHWyXwy5T7T9C_DhKt_cJbJw8fjQT1hQ==) \- Senator John Cornyn Paid for by Texans for Senator John Cornyn This email was sent to $SUBSCRIBER.EMAIL. With you on board, we're one step closer to keeping Texas red and fighting to create a future we can all be proud of. On behalf of all of us, we're glad you're on board. Now that you're on Team Cornyn, make sure that you're keeping up to date with the latest news. The best way to do so? Following our campaign on [Facebook](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LR9yFugw7EzCVRu1FRUqOiZnkrPdBI0vmjyrzo6HQyoUo4lkeZtXu51jKrQxdiGKc7eNpdYPOCxdDYtqwZgKXBV90OC66AsOcGhASVdy2KiwfCpGzTcuRC5vt0_eiJBakfXAJGIV63F5vALGB-_tdE7mLgEXZhjTqUP6WACfLwQ=&c=SvoQamG3TgVYkxq1bODiFkjA3Zf6TjK0Wt1q6RT4KXPaDgH903OSpg==&ch=QBtR4QQvyPPQED4rC0wVY1eHWyXwy5T7T9C_DhKt_cJbJw8fjQT1hQ==) and [Twitter](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LR9yFugw7EzCVRu1FRUqOiZnkrPdBI0vmjyrzo6HQyoUo4lkeZtXu96fxDeB4s08KX-veWfbR27j2ZHr1yBKEGrfL7qO6Fz2E9_AReu2oePVnLs7wmoqWhsPz-5ptGOZznQs-ey2K0nw4TRX07kZhrrpDzFiNeRP&c=SvoQamG3TgVYkxq1bODiFkjA3Zf6TjK0Wt1q6RT4KXPaDgH903OSpg==&ch=QBtR4QQvyPPQED4rC0wVY1eHWyXwy5T7T9C_DhKt_cJbJw8fjQT1hQ==) \- that way you'll always be the first to know when something important comes up. Now, if you're still reading this, we know you're really ready to stand up and protect Texas. To aid your fight, we suggest you turn [this song](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LR9yFugw7EzCVRu1FRUqOiZnkrPdBI0vmjyrzo6HQyoUo4lkeZtXu51jKrQxdiGKU5lAd0kYxrkVSMRU0OF46bslMIzr8PzWc5BsvB9nNtvc9MjrpPtO3ii5EcdwfOFAEzyGOrxfZUoUn3v-LVlkIIj8smdNMmxf7JH3Ce9bUar-91GZ20MDYg==&c=SvoQamG3TgVYkxq1bODiFkjA3Zf6TjK0Wt1q6RT4KXPaDgH903OSpg==&ch=QBtR4QQvyPPQED4rC0wVY1eHWyXwy5T7T9C_DhKt_cJbJw8fjQT1hQ==) up on full volume and do anything you can to help stop the dangerous policies being pedaled by the left to oppose our president and replace our conservative Texas values. Once you're pumped up and ready to go, head over to our [volunteer page](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LR9yFugw7EzCVRu1FRUqOiZnkrPdBI0vmjyrzo6HQyoUo4lkeZtXu1H-QkuxA4AmhPbPOZyz7QyvezrsQkrULaV05UTcGlmkivwE8K_yWa7-4HeC1xPMEBdHUuEiz4OGWbeqcwZpuS8FGt6NLLVxXTOTwhTMtvEfksX5JeY5KZ4_Dw_n8lIU_f5ZEBZwQuNzOTN3Z6dtqUCP3BJ9n22ndp9umd_r1QBBlCOBu4-7GrIPDQWdt78Rj_-rx49nBc-r8pN7qerYWX6gVNIOnBDGbSNy0QTxvikUaYjWyZ8yO4tMsac3L2MP7Q==&c=SvoQamG3TgVYkxq1bODiFkjA3Zf6TjK0Wt1q6RT4KXPaDgH903OSpg==&ch=QBtR4QQvyPPQED4rC0wVY1eHWyXwy5T7T9C_DhKt_cJbJw8fjQT1hQ==) and find out exactly how you can help. We'd be proud to have you join us. Thank you for all you do to support John Cornyn for Senate Together, we can protect this great state we know and love, and promote a safe, prosperous, and healthy Texas. name: Mondaire Jones
subject: So grateful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_ Our mailing address is:
body:
Last week, we finished our first fundraising quarter of the year and I am pleased to report our campaign has raised well over $820,000 so far, including well over $330,000 in the first quarter of 2020. | | | [
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/HgE/ni0YAA/t.30q/-OQ8A52lSz2qVJEU9Mql5A/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNL3iNtYr2M93i1m9J73r1PfewBNrLzQNZtPquD7Ua-2Bk6TjuLT3Nk94jdBdRRG-2BXHAdWTvHXptrha95SxEyjVEY-2BWziSkWIXVVp0ptmXOGwMrs0CK-2B4PBLVSYtGoQMbz8vkP4XjErewBqeVspKPYWp4kGVfZJvkxirM3TWRxBR4aGxWpnL7hoNZKujzA7TVsI5u92vo48F2kml7JHz3DZTz8/bW6R) Friend, **** **** **** Last week, we finished our first fundraising quarter of the year and I am pleased to report our campaign has raised well over $820,000 so far, including well over $330,000 in the first quarter of 2020. We did all of this without self-funding or accepting a penny in corporate PAC money, unlike our competition.
Friend, I am so grateful to you.
Growing up in Section 8 housing in the Village of Spring Valley, I never imagined that I could one day run for Congress. Now, it is surreal that almost 10 months into my campaign, I have been endorsed by national leaders like Senator Elizabeth Warren and continue to lead the field in fundraising and grassroots organizing thanks to a dedicated team of volunteers. None of this would have been possible without everyday people like you stepping up to join our movement, and I am eternally grateful for your support.
There are fewer than 3 months left until Election Day. While these are uncertain times, our current crisis shows us just how important it is to elect leaders who will fight for the big, structural changes necessary to ensure that no American has to forgo necessary medical treatment or live paycheck to paycheck.
Your support means more now than ever before. Can I ask you to do two things?
One, **_[please sign up for a volunteer shift to help us reach every single Democratic voter in our district](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/HgE/ni0YAA/t.30q/-OQ8A52lSz2qVJEU9Mql5A/h1/I3pn4SJUQx-2BiuYuahoeeGnKKu-2BoG4-2BOsx2bcmEQ-2FBUMQBNIvQEjsBJWyDyf6ullkl7P4LTbNnIZowduQa3SRiTxgImcoJesEt5STdBd51jDF0Ou4GRqv0bDJC90WURY7jyhm5w0RzFAsMAwMJHQ2Cw66tGyxQbtlrUJLCPb-2BcCppo0SJvPyWJG6ih6Eo13dJUbWSKnlNMiKsC-2B4THP0fWmfu6NSeNKDuJGJVC7OG9-2BYxCM-2BaKiXDvySfz0VzdISC/GvAc)_**. We have transitioned our field operation online and need your help calling and texting voters to share our message.
Two, if you can, **_[please make a contribution to our campaign today](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/HgE/ni0YAA/t.30q/-OQ8A52lSz2qVJEU9Mql5A/h2/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNL3iNtYr2M93i1m9J73r1PfewBNrLzQNZtPquD7Ua-2Bk6cF-2FNqwbbQ9OH4QmuWfFXxduRyP1TqBAaxqG33NychkiYUCQ44FU8PMGrO2UEoUcQsUHMrYpGEmhJUECEG-2Bj1Lsn2b2rBu6DO3zf179k4HYZEnt4vq9sI07kF10ohMHYvPtBx8Fv12-2FE1XZBRygvarXE5UnlyGY-2BuaiSiqgLhJ1n/vxH3)_**. We have done an incredible job fundraising, but the fact is, this race will take well over a million dollars to win. **Without the ability to reach voters in person, fundraising has become even more urgent**. Whatever you are able to give will go a long way in helping us win on June 23rd.
Thank you so much for all of your support so far. We are a people-powered movement and none of this would be possible without supporters like you. We’re going to win this thing.
[Donate >>](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/HgE/ni0YAA/t.30q/-OQ8A52lSz2qVJEU9Mql5A/h3/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNL3iNtYr2M93i1m9J73r1PfewBNrLzQNZtPquD7Ua-2Bk6cyYAhKqpjV0kQRUSjjRb3qThTKQn3WWD-2Bb4WzXWmTTGIDaHTIDByf-2BStYi0v96K5LMpIuHgEDH2sn-2BTkgDJaVBgrRVwj0QjelCtg73deW1-2FpW-2BbjVHeN-2BuhRZm4FIrgf10xbdRl7Xsmdy7OWyss3E3LZAFGlUzdOCqWtF2jj0b0/yB2X)

body:

Peter,

From a young age, the ideals of freedom and the American Dream were instilled in me. My parents were refugees who fled Communist Cuba with just five dollars in their pocket seeking their own vision of the American Dream.

**Taking those values to heart, I was able to pursue my American Dream and spent my career as a journalist exposing oppressive regimes throughout Latin America, where the American Dream is but a glimmer of hope in a socialist nightmare.**

However today, I see more and more Americans who think the American Dream is gone. Even worse, socialist politicians like AOC believe it never even existed. But, I don’t believe that’s true for the majority of Americans.**Peter, I want your feedback!** **[Do you still believe in the American Dream?](http://links.mariaelvirasalazar.com/u/click?_t=a6858014873940e4ab6d0ae3b994ef92&_m=a22eeb2d70844e53b425ca3f564d422c&_e=Ysvx3FpUbydgUEjxvHzyhItnEocrJiLGK7VBV53vfKiAxmNQk_wPW_J2gCjOhUWyS86wbN1pSOEAGs0xtBLltXkesDq6fwcNXsgPx88zFBwyPjpPUKrOsfRskeJCjoRa4n2OMCIPWGknYPxgsCZU8ZKFMplxFP5-TATz8TVy2GIc7pC1UY3tejKfl3Pf1VMsPwj1vA0k-Eoq-0ZSvwCdQWoreLaE22ey9IN_Pvo2z7QVKqqLm-lb3YMXIkC6dFrLRwGJnGFrBZIHnZID6nawxefxr30z0j5wop2SBFk_r2a2a4vzZcgrq46Ym6N8wp2NHh1fg1jBAyeSd1njJX7rpmMC_3sLLZpDJA-t-JePx0r0GHkFCd1GtkMxoU72lsPVyRu0ebT3oYKVkZDufOsui2ESWT1D12en0tzaEAQnYWnF3ofa_zdQIArn4t_ahily)**

Peter, I was born in Little Havana to parents who fled Cuba with just five dollars in their pocket, the pursuit of freedom and the American Dream which was instilled into me at an early age. Being raised in Miami and Puerto Rico, I heard stories of the **OPPRESSIVE** communist regime from which my parents escaped.

I graduated from the University of Miami and put myself through Harvard University. I began a career in journalism where I interviewed a wide range of social and political leaders. My focus, driven by my passion for freedom, was uncovering the oppressive communist and socialist regimes in Latin America.

**That same passion for freedom is what drives me today in my run for Congress.** Join me in my fight to preserve the American Dream by taking my poll at this secure link: **[https://secure.winred.com/salazar/issue-survey-79382/](http://links.mariaelvirasalazar.com/u/click?_t=a6858014873940e4ab6d0ae3b994ef92&_m=a22eeb2d70844e53b425ca3f564d422c&_e=Ysvx3FpUbydgUEjxvHzyhItnEocrJiLGK7VBV53vfKiAxmNQk_wPW_J2gCjOhUWyS86wbN1pSOEAGs0xtBLltXkesDq6fwcNXsgPx88zFBwyPjpPUKrOsfRskeJCjoRa4n2OMCIPWGknYPxgsCZU8ZKFMplxFP5-TATz8TVy2GIc7pC1UY3tejKfl3Pf1VMsPwj1vA0k-Eoq-0ZSvwCdQWoreLaE22ey9IN_Pvo2z7S0XyBKfxAfZcbv7ye11-2_SY7jEdXOXS4Qt4tT6Rs6hJU_Jjx3x8AXT5evgP1z3Cs3-LscdXtc3UOA6Q8K9UzRwbUtaC_jmye34fvRilvHbh9y4wwLwIyW-cL2nDCoxRWBgfe1bKxZzo_-Ro0QAj_wavrGfsUIFe5JSNtMqnldpKNC3VcxhQXb-NKMqN_jKsgaGDmDJqIbzM49vunweb_a)**

name: Jason Yates
subject: Tell your Governor to ban elective abortions right now
body:
| | Peter, COVID-19 has brought devastation to our nation and loss of life. Yet, in the midst of it all, we have the opportunity to **save** countless lives. How, might you ask? [By urging your state governor to ban elective abortions during this crisis](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=j7HNdFFdmHSh8w7VvhTEBuNy9QgHt69LtLDC5jTf_oI&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200407p2a01&n=1). We are partnering with Faces of Choice to launch an important new campaign called #NotADisease, and we need your help. Eleven states have already issued emergency orders requiring health centers to cease all elective, non-essential surgeries and medical procedures, both to inhibit the spread of COVID-19, and to direct all PPE (personal protection equipment) to the hospital workers who are desperately trying to save lives. **Many hospitals are without the essential masks and gowns they need to treat infected patients, and yet Planned Parenthood locations throughout the country are requesting donations of PPE, and continue to abort children. This is untenable.** Disturbingly, of the eleven states that have already issued an emergency ban on elective abortions (Texas, Oklahoma, Louisiana, Indiana, Kentucky, Tennessee, Mississippi, Maryland, Ohio, Alabama, and Iowa), only three are acting in compliance with their governors' orders, and in the remaining 39 states abortions are still continuing. **Abortion is, at best, an elective surgery, and as vacuum aspiration abortion survivor Jennifer Milbourn notes, "Abortion is not healthcare; I am not a disease that needs to be taken care of."** Join with us and urge your state governor to issue or enforce emergency orders to ban elective abortions by using our simple tool **[here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=j7HNdFFdmHSh8w7VvhTEBuNy9QgHt69LtLDC5jTf_oI&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200407p2a01&n=2)**. Then forward this email to as many people as possible, urging them to take action as well. On social media, you can use the hashtag #NotADisease when you share this campaign. The irony of this horrible international pandemic is that the lives of countless pre-born children may be saved, if we take action. Finally, please pray for all of the mothers who are currently in the midst of crisis pregnancies, the stress of which is certainly exacerbated by COVID-19. Pray against fear and anguish, and join us in asking God to help them see the value of the precious lives within their wombs, as many around the world are dying at this very moment in time. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=j7HNdFFdmHSh8w7VvhTEBuNy9QgHt69LtLDC5jTf_oI&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200407p2a01&n=3) Now is the time for us to make sure COVID-19 patients and medical personnel have all the supplies they need, and to ensure elective abortion procedures are halted during this crisis and, prayerfully, forevermore. **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200407p2a01&n=4)

name: Team Ferguson
subject: FWD They are at it again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Drew Ferguson For Congress
body:
As the nation battles COVID-19, Democrats are politicizing this public health crisis. Fight back against Democrats' political gamesmanship.

Friend,

We wanted to make sure that you saw Drew's email. As the nation battles COVID-19, Democrats are politicizing this public health crisis.

President Trump and House Republicans showed leadership and took action from the get go while Democrats were impeaching and trying to remove Trump from office.

Fight back against Democrats' political gamesmanship.

[**Join Drew Ferguson and stand with President Trump.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014gHByx14S6CZjtSJK4pp04vwRJXxQKEdJQG9A4hEwT8ClVjmWf_Wj4NRw6prQBI1xkwZm0NIqw3DbGMUc2GQXPEpmGpnIu6zNbr1HluxirbDEjuBD_KaUP_FeiCj3c-he-9iqdfjgrcCBKnPgFCDL1amjTMrhlRdCPvTQHXK_WxDp75GpacjkpWEMM8tVIlEz5AK_2BDr8PUf4ilBKKSVF9eAlq6-1ZwyUducIAavxAoQ13U3KSzwLNSCYi4VdWx5wWZuVVYC3LWg3GcqkQP2FvZoB6SE1KhNw0_PABQ28QT-3Dy2h2FTOAdZW-1U4dcAKHuL2PS9Mcq3YfFstZXBjFKJW5Dx0TYM1Un3KqQ7mpnJVX7VZnEC_mxvKqog72xXPqSi7IYSpE=&c=3UcvVIDqNJ2eKNj3EGVi0njUaJY3ea4Q9WIC8un6f69byEL1zRg1Vg==&ch=SMlzW_hsuy64C5lq6PUuQup3iRcygyK60zjBKvAuzO9sNJtwCMGd6g==)

_Team Ferguson_

\--- Forwarded Message ---
Sender: Congressman Drew Ferguson
Subject: They are at it again
Date: April 5, 2020

Friend,

As our nation battles a public health crisis, Democrats play political games.

Nancy Pelosi announced that House Democrats will create a new politically motivated House committee to investigate the Trump Administration's response to the COVID-19 crisis.

This is just the latest example showing how out of touch Democrats are with the rest of the nation.

From the Russia hoax to impeachment, the Democrats' number one objective has always been to overturn the results of the 2016 election and remove Trump from office.

While Democrats were focused on the impeachment trial above all else, the Trump Administration was leading the way to combat COVID-19.

We should be coming together as a nation to find a resolution to the unprecedented ramifications of the coronavirus.

Instead, Democrats' top priority of defeating Trump remains unchanged during this public health crisis.

We need to show leadership to navigate us through these unsettling times.

[**Join me and House Conservatives to stand with President Trump to lead us to victory over COVID-19.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014gHByx14S6CZjtSJK4pp04vwRJXxQKEdJQG9A4hEwT8ClVjmWf_Wj3p0VIU6WKFES0bh1j2syXbePgPa9r4oXQGeY5vkL5u8yEXA0_9EcTDVe5-PspEbo2HMdiwO7NlPXIbb1MaGa5hS1B5oFuK2bCESZLO6dVuy8m5ZKNagIid5oBVHNRUbQ6WRaMnmqDpjacZFzBdSj02kWqxXplilmBWcv7VYW5WxovwnwdP4JKRaxLFCwGOer5kMTAvBayXwzW7oF-dwhK79kvjBi0EmWBEykkopUfqh0f9UrHCarW1ZY2LBrjqWHo6GCnmzNvneLw-WE9UZgOVaiJIljZZ5Js_HLReh1TAOzyCzsjXhOUmHJaBH7E6lqaWHxirnmBedbqsWp1KdB94=&c=3UcvVIDqNJ2eKNj3EGVi0njUaJY3ea4Q9WIC8un6f69byEL1zRg1Vg==&ch=SMlzW_hsuy64C5lq6PUuQup3iRcygyK60zjBKvAuzO9sNJtwCMGd6g==)

Thanks,

Congressman Drew Ferguson

name: Team Hickenlooper
subject: [Breaking] New analysis proves our campaign is surging
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
**Good news:** John Hickenlooper is surging in the polls, and our Republican opponent is now considered the “underdog” according to new political analysis from Roll Call released yesterday. Together we’re building a grassroots team that can win. **Bad news:** Mitch McConnell’s super PAC just booked $5.5 million in ads supporting our Republican opponent, just as our fundraising began to slow down after canceling our in-person events. Colorado is the Democrats’ best shot at flipping a Republican-held Senate seat, and we cannot allow the Republicans’ dark money network to undo all of our progress toward winning this election. name: Team Booker
subject: The power of community
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORY BOOKER FOR SENATE
body:
|
#
Friends, We've all been working hard to do our part in stopping the spread of the coronavirus. We've been keeping six feet or more from each other, forgoing handshakes and hugs, and limiting trips outside of the home to essential errands only. We wanted to reach out quickly, check in on how you're holding up, and offer a few other ways to make a difference you may not have considered yet.
* Our nation's blood supply is dangerously low right now. If you're able, please consider **[donating blood](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0e7e/5fca0d19/7a7cb135/291d14c1/1519750809/VEsH/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.redcross.org/give-blood.html?utm_medium=email&utm_source=bookerlive&utm_content=1+-+donating+blood&utm_campaign=em200407&source=em200407")**.

* Share the National Domestic Violence Hotline on all your social media channels. Those seeking help can call **1-800-799-SAFE (7233)** or visit **[www.thehotline.org](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0e7e/5fca0d19/7a7cb135/291d14c0/1519750809/VEsE/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.thehotline.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=bookerlive&utm_content=2+-+wwwthehotlineorg&utm_campaign=em200407&source=em200407")** to find resources available during this crisis.

* In just a few weeks, this team has raised thousands for the **[Community FoodBank of New Jersey](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0e7e/5fca0d19/7a7cb135/291d14cf/1519750809/VEsF/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-covid-foodbanknj&refcode=cab-em-200406-help?utm_medium=email&utm_source=bookerlive&utm_content=3+-+Community+FoodBank+of+New+Jersey&utm_campaign=em200407&source=em200407")**. Find a **[local food bank near you](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0e7e/5fca0d19/7a7cb135/291d14ce/1519750809/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.feedingamerica.org/find-your-local-foodbank?utm_medium=email&utm_source=bookerlive&utm_content=4+-+local+food+bank+near+you&utm_campaign=em200407&source=em200407")** and get in touch to see how you can help in this time of need.

* Self-isolating can be a very difficult part of the coronavirus pandemic. Call your friends, family members or neighbors and check in with them. This is a great opportunity to call that relative you've been meaning to connect with or to catch up with old friends.

Above all, we hope you're taking care of yourself and your loved ones. Stay well. We'll be in touch again soon. Team Booker

---
PAID FOR BY CORY BOOKER FOR SENATE
---
[unsubscribe](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0e7e/5fca0d19/7a7cb135/291d14cd/1519750809/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=bookerlive&utm_content=5+-+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=em200407&source=em200407")

name: Preston, MJ Hegar for Texas
subject: "Why Texas will soon be the most politically important state" (Important from CNN)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Here's the deal, Peter:

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890387/7f51f7bc/4c9a6a7a/4ef13349/4073042206/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890387/7f51f7bc/4c9a6a7a/4ef13348/4073042206/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExNzUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200407.1nd__1175__&amount=10&recurring=true")
---

Here's the deal, Peter: According to CNN, "Texas is emerging as a swing state..."

As they say, everything's bigger in Texas, and now its impact on our politics is going to get even more massive.

That makes it _even more important_ to elect the kind of leadership this state -- and this nation -- needs. **There 's only one person in this Senate race who fits the bill: MJ Hegar.**
[**Will you donate right away to send MJ to the Senate to fight for Texas?**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890387/7f51f7bc/4c9a6a7a/4ef13348/4073042206/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExNzUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200407.1nd__1175__&amount=10&recurring=true")
Senator Cornyn's actions -- including selling out to Big Pharma, the gun lobby, and other special interests -- speak louder than his words. The only people he listens to are his big donors and DC bosses like Mitch McConnell.

MJ's different. **She listens to the people, and that 's never been clearer than during the COVID-19 pandemic.** While Sen. Cornyn dithered and downplayed, she called for the policies Texas families need: Economic support, emergency paid sick leave, and a health care system that can meet their needs.

Texas has two choices in 2020: Elect more of the same and hope for different results, or **send a proven fighter to the Senate to stand up for Texans.** Let's make the right choice. **Pitch in now to elect MJ Hegar in 2020!**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890387/7f51f7bc/4c9a6a7a/4ef1334f/4073042206/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExNzUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200407.1nd__1175__&amount=5")**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890387/7f51f7bc/4c9a6a7a/4ef1334e/4073042206/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExNzUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200407.1nd__1175__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890387/7f51f7bc/4c9a6a7a/4ef1334d/4073042206/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExNzUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200407.1nd__1175__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890387/7f51f7bc/4c9a6a7a/4ef1334c/4073042206/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExNzUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200407.1nd__1175__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890387/7f51f7bc/4c9a6a7a/4ef13343/4073042206/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExNzUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200407.1nd__1175__")**
Thanks,
Preston Elliott, Campaign Manager

**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890387/7f51f7bc/4c9a6a7a/4ef13348/4073042206/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExNzUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200407.1nd__1175__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890387/7f51f7bc/4c9a6a7a/4ef13342/4073042206/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExNzUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1175&amount=10&recurring=true")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

body:

name: Congressman Al Green
subject: World Health Day 2020
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Keep Al Green in Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/wzDwODo6tJwDfw7lJAkPtsK0NTIztBqG5wN0F5uUoGE=/gA-EKxKi7M6YfRT79nj8MUgKmqlL4DLD2cPOa_d_prM=)
---
| Folks, **Today is World Health Day, an international day of recognition for the work that healthcare professionals do to keep us safe and healthy.** This year's theme is "support nurses and midwives." Right now, millions of nurses and midwives -- as well as doctors, EMTs, pharmacists, and other health workers -- are risking their own safety to treat patients infected with COVID-19. They are working around the clock to ensure every patient receives the best care possible despite drastic shortages in ICU beds, ventilators, and personal protective equipment (PPE). **I have been working with people, organizations, and companies to distribute nearly 20,000 unused PPE masks to healthcare workers here in Houston, and I will continue to advocate for those on the front lines to receive the resources they need to treat patients safely and effectively.** **But today, I want to ask for your help in thanking our healthcare workers for their bravery, dedication, and sacrifice. Will you forward this message to a healthcare worker you know to show your appreciation?** Thank you, Congressman Al Green
---
* * *
| | Congressman Al Green has served the people of Texas' 9th district for 15 years. He is a progressive leader in Washington and was the first Member of Congress to introduce articles of impeachment against President Trump on the House floor.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because we want to keep you fully informed about Al's work for justice, accountability, and progress. If you'd prefer not to hear from us, you can [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/wzDwODo6tJwDfw7lJAkPtsK0NTIztBqG5wN0F5uUoGE=/JRDwoilCJCNDbhoDsxl8ZY454nFOPM-uLZLJHRAfgnQ=) here.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump Leads While Opponents Stay on Attack
body:
“President Trump is doing everything in his power to ensure the health and safety of the American people during the coronavirus pandemic.” | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a4bae6fb88&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **President Trump Leads While Opponents Stay on Attack**

“President Trump is doing everything in his power to ensure the health and safety of the American people during the coronavirus pandemic,” Deneen Borelli writes for Fox News.

In the past, moments of global crisis have united our country. Outside of Washington, that’s happening again: Strong majorities of Americans approve of the President’s Coronavirus response and are confident in the Federal Government’s ability to handle it. Regrettably, partisan Democrats in Congress and the media can’t help but play politics.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6120a5d0de&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Having practiced medicine for nearly 30 years, I have seen how foreign dependence, specifically on imports from China, harms the medical supply chain and our readiness for an outbreak firsthand . . . The COVID-19 pandemic has exacerbated problems that were already festering,” Rep. Roger Marshall (R-KS) writes in [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d4078f3341&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| President Trump pledged to reinvigorate U.S. auto manufacturing by rewriting costly, unrealistic fuel economy and vehicle emissions standards. The new SAFE Vehicles Rule upholds that promise, raising fuel economy standards by a reasonable 1.5 percent per year to promote safe, clean, and affordable cars, Transportation Secretary Elaine Chao and EPA Administrator Andrew Wheeler write in the [_Cleveland Plain Dealer_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e38cc850b1&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| When President Trump announced a restriction on travel from Europe last month, European Union officials “erupted in outrage.” A few days later, those same officials would propose their own bans. “In the coronavirus crisis, everyone realizes the importance of borders, even the people who not long ago were ideologically hostile toward them,” Rich Lowry writes in [_National Review_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=02cc9a9887&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ab90e6b190&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9c623d5e0a&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=fd01dbe295)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

I'm Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district.

Have you heard about the Democrat Governor of North Carolina? **He not only declared abortions to be "essential services", but that 8 pro-lifers peacefully protesting an abortion clinic had to be arrested:**

_Police on Saturday charged eight Charlotte abortion protesters with violating North Carolina’s COVID-19-related ban on mass gatherings._

_The arrests went national late Saturday when U.S. Sen. Ted Cruz of Texas criticized Charlotte-Mecklenburg Police._

_“_ _This is an unconstitutional arrest,” Cruz, a runner-up for the Republican presidential nomination in the 2016 election, tweeted. “@BenhamBrothers exercising core First Amendment rights. PEACEFULLY. In a way fully consistent w/ public safety. Because elected Dems are pro-abortion, they are abusing their power—in a one-sided way—to silence pregnancy counselors.”_

_My opponent, Democrat G.K. Butterfield, supports this radical promotion of abortion.... and the suppression of our First Amendment rights._

name: Josh Hicks
subject: Leadership
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
body:
Friends —

When I was in the Marines, we were taught to adapt and overcome.

Over the last four weeks, millions of Americans have adapted to a new way of life. Families are learning how to teach their children at home. Parents are balancing child care while working. Healthcare, retail, and restaurant workers are providing essential services to keep us safe and healthy while putting their own lives on the line.

What happens during this time will shape our nation for a generation.

And what our leaders do in the coming weeks, months, and years will affect how we, as Americans, will overcome.

This week, I wrote an opinion column in the Lexington Herald-Leader about how Congress and our leaders in Kentucky have addressed this crisis. Here’s a preview:

These are serious times we are living in. The rapid spread of COVID-19 requires a serious response and all our attention, and I know with great leadership, we will get through this together.

But my fears are probably a lot like yours: that ordinary folks are not getting the care or attention they deserve, and that Washington’s priorities too often align more with the economic interests of big corporations than with the needs of regular people here at home.

In dire times like these, we need real leadership.

When I was in the US Marine Corps, I saw that kind of leadership from my fellow Marines. I saw it when I was a Maysville police officer. Those who wear the uniform when the job is hard and the pay isn’t great – those are our real public servants. Our veterans, first responders, teachers, and nurses.

— Josh Hicks, Lexington Herald-Leader 4/3/2020, In the midst of virus crisis, Congress needs to prioritize regular folks [https://www.kentucky.com/opinion/op-ed/article241676126.html]

READ MORE [https://www.kentucky.com/opinion/op-ed/article241676126.html]

It’s Congress’ job to do the work quietly, and their work should benefit the people, not corporations. Every waking hour should be spent working to keep families and local economies afloat. Leadership means putting others before yourself, and that’s what we have to demand from politicians.

I demand it from myself and I expect you to demand it from me. That’s my promise: that I will be a servant leader, and that’s what we need to overcome this crisis together.

Thank you for reading and for being on this team.

- Josh

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jhicks-apr?refcode=hic_20200407_hloped_em_fr_all_ftr1

Lexington, KY 40588

Josh grew up in Fleming County before leaving to serve in the Marines. After two deployments, he returned to Kentucky to serve his community as a police officer and attorney.
He’s running to represent hardworking, everyday Kentuckians. Not corporations. That means his campaign is relying on grassroots donations — lots of small donations from emails like this — not big checks from corporate special interests. name: Joni Ernst
subject: Will you commit?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joni for Iowa
body:
Things look a little different right now in our country, but our fight for Iowans has not changed.
Hey Friend,

Things look a little different right now in our country, but our fight for Iowans has not changed.

Over these past few weeks, I have been working with state and local leaders to find solutions and provide immediate relief to our communities during this difficult time. I have fought to secure funding for small business and critical industries to ensure they have the support they need, and I've been so encouraged by the acts of kindness by Iowans across the state who have participated in the #MyCOVIDfive challenge.

While our work for Iowa continues on, our fight is only as strong as our support from our grassroots. Online contributions have become our main driver of fundraising during these times, and that means meeting our online digital goals is now more important than ever before.

**That 's why our team has set a goal of 250 NEW monthly donor sign-ups.** With your support, we'll be able to reach our digital goals each month and ensure our fight for Iowa continues on strong.

Will you commit to a monthly contribution of any size? [_**Click here to give $5 monthly!**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yoFeg18ZwuLR3gF_Y-We_c4yLaA_IAENuhT0MrTtXcNjGRvHkRtgfsaKL5rSta8R4srPklPhbfhXdsXtsHbm_aI51rR1dTW6WZz9YwIbw1VFxS8N07HHo1d2-F6gJUcBCawC3CRTSfs9g5ZzWhMu9Z7sZDBvYKetUTPII78PMKAlDch2DCmB8eAh8hgbnSCdEuDbln4Tm_hSYUSxjZgt2ki5io15--tk79oMNCLgMyB-ikK8wIZnR49VImlM4M06arbxgVt6TpeUVGnKMsKTsJBE68nzesqI3HdJ-_EdUbKRisQLKQ9fL-hS5K_EaIxZiHfE8EE77xRBf_aUM2NEkSlPBIKZHFOa&c=kQTIfeBRJ7vbtCZm2Otzey3llnvzEwW210-lt6lXTTxOXmrLTpsJaA==&ch=njw8FHoRty0kdBPLrNLpTb8rrN6vT418FOiHnau22YaiX7b4MZUW9Q==)

So please, help us reach our goal before time runs out! Joni Ernst

body:
Narrowing it down was tough, but in an election as important as this everything counts.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HNxaf0LnrWnMARfJOZ_bm_V6F-V71KiAN75sJiBNi9t0eMW4AHCDutcsvnBFl3aFjgoRIjiBtafL7Ttqt-Fjq21roeZVJoTyhmfmtUXJJX7JuGnhCyeg0GLPf1SA1AkrBhGugh3ydFdLpI2xNC2P2s10OaxTp67_KyIE-qZSUqHz3QjbMXfMKBa34iEsAFH16OTxzLoqQ7NCjFbyneKVUI1MIKsCmQ1YuuTIk7pbifgpjSDvMsiUQD_qRK59c3MRCCNVVZy9B08lfyI9-DBc1FVq4qWRY7rCnK4ZRK8UdhUHcJJ46fbjMG8-dNTGx0BO01ItzVWbsjp60QUkJzB602fX8pZooPV6XY8gmLhsZX0=&c=2Dlw5z40CPB0IW0BW1VsPbkfx5-7wnE0j2mKAlR9eYHRYlFbiZ8v8A==&ch=72Htx4XBdau0zbi4pPX0LGI7sRZ3CPgJiDuWIZwXYSo5vMzL6zk-Ig==) [](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HNxaf0LnrWnMARfJOZ_bm_V6F-V71KiAN75sJiBNi9t0eMW4AHCDutcsvnBFl3aFjgoRIjiBtafL7Ttqt-Fjq21roeZVJoTyhmfmtUXJJX7JuGnhCyeg0GLPf1SA1AkrBhGugh3ydFdLpI2xNC2P2s10OaxTp67_KyIE-qZSUqHz3QjbMXfMKBa34iEsAFH16OTxzLoqQ7NCjFbyneKVUI1MIKsCmQ1YuuTIk7pbifgpjSDvMsiUQD_qRK59c3MRCCNVVZy9B08lfyI9-DBc1FVq4qWRY7rCnK4ZRK8UdhUHcJJ46fbjMG8-dNTGx0BO01ItzVWbsjp60QUkJzB602fX8pZooPV6XY8gmLhsZX0=&c=2Dlw5z40CPB0IW0BW1VsPbkfx5-7wnE0j2mKAlR9eYHRYlFbiZ8v8A==&ch=72Htx4XBdau0zbi4pPX0LGI7sRZ3CPgJiDuWIZwXYSo5vMzL6zk-Ig==)[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HNxaf0LnrWnMARfJOZ_bm_V6F-V71KiAN75sJiBNi9t0eMW4AHCDutcsvnBFl3aFjgoRIjiBtafL7Ttqt-Fjq21roeZVJoTyhmfmtUXJJX7JuGnhCyeg0GLPf1SA1AkrBhGugh3ydFdLpI2xNC2P2s10OaxTp67_KyIE-qZSUqHz3QjbMXfMKBa34iEsAFH1F_FSlfB5xpc=&c=2Dlw5z40CPB0IW0BW1VsPbkfx5-7wnE0j2mKAlR9eYHRYlFbiZ8v8A==&ch=72Htx4XBdau0zbi4pPX0LGI7sRZ3CPgJiDuWIZwXYSo5vMzL6zk-Ig==)
Friend,

I could come up with a million reasons why Michelle Steel is the conservative fighter we need in Congress and why your support is critical, but if I had to narrow it down to my top five:
* Whoever wins this seat will determine who controls the House Majority.
* This seat was only recently flipped blue in 2018.
* This race is being called a toss-up and will come down to just a handful of votes.
* Michelle is a first generation American fighting to fix a broken political system that's taking advantage of the very people it was built to serve.
* We will not win without your help.

[**In an election as important as this, every little bit counts. Can we count on you to chip in $10, $5, or even just $1 to get us where we need to be? Your contribution will have a direct impact on the future of the campaign and the decisions we make going forward.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HNxaf0LnrWnMARfJOZ_bm_V6F-V71KiAN75sJiBNi9t0eMW4AHCDutcsvnBFl3aFjgoRIjiBtafL7Ttqt-Fjq21roeZVJoTyhmfmtUXJJX7JuGnhCyeg0GLPf1SA1AkrBhGugh3ydFdLpI2xNC2P2s10OaxTp67_KyIE-qZSUqHz3QjbMXfMKBa34iEsAFH16OTxzLoqQ7NCjFbyneKVUI1MIKsCmQ1YuuTIk7pbifgpjSDvMsiUQD_qRK59c3MRCCNVVZy9B08lfyI9-DBc1FVq4qWRY7rCnK4ZRK8UdhUHcJJ46fbjMG8-dNTGx0BO01ItzVWbsjp60QUkJzB602fX8pZooPV6XY8gmLhsZX0=&c=2Dlw5z40CPB0IW0BW1VsPbkfx5-7wnE0j2mKAlR9eYHRYlFbiZ8v8A==&ch=72Htx4XBdau0zbi4pPX0LGI7sRZ3CPgJiDuWIZwXYSo5vMzL6zk-Ig==)

But with so much going on right now, we know we're asking for a lot. So even if you aren't able to chip in right now, we could still use your help. [**Stand with Steel and sign your name HERE to add your name to our growing list of grassroots endorsements.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HNxaf0LnrWnMARfJOZ_bm_V6F-V71KiAN75sJiBNi9t0eMW4AHCDugUynbNrc71qbGdaAnGsU6KcOmDXy1ptR7fr1Vq6-5GDEL-ODPYL2j0Y11mKZkMJDPFjIaeP_4kmYTxBwec8ny3OyuwQbUT6KCk1YlDfwYgi7w5O5iMaqQFT-nX_9HICpD5RZ7P84kCbTmQBHnLlIbMcsE8ta4Zi4M-018bDRkWZk4lHy8vjl16CGIi0TrAGPxt-ZI6ERW1rlXqRrAvaoXQ8mYbZaDF6rlna8aG3r6PXEtcUcg5H6I6LN5KWqNYsi_NBW7_CjWIiQ4SJCrCuPtrlmW_0M256CWDz1DJ0HZNf&c=2Dlw5z40CPB0IW0BW1VsPbkfx5-7wnE0j2mKAlR9eYHRYlFbiZ8v8A==&ch=72Htx4XBdau0zbi4pPX0LGI7sRZ3CPgJiDuWIZwXYSo5vMzL6zk-Ig==)

Thank you,

Team Steel

name: Sri Preston Kulkarni
subject: COVID-19 Survey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
As you may have already heard, our campaign recently expanded our work in TX-22 to include a focus on community resources and immediate needs amid the COVID-19 crisis.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/mMc1YKCrE9eAqZs5PMcrQn_3EoU3LlXmZtlYIaknWb0=/pbHatq-e8c-BayFx0QKA7QM7CslTAq44jaLXm7fwYxA=)
---
| _Sri and our entire team hopes you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families.

Please visit our [COVID-19 community resource guide](https://act.myngp.com/el/mMc1YKCrE9eAqZs5PMcrQn_3EoU3LlXmZtlYIaknWb0=/pqnDATBBChGyd7kOj1Vcc2nswe1rCbmJSFgjR4MqQhc=) to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe._

* * *

Team,

I have a favor to ask.

As you may have already heard, our campaign recently expanded our work in TX-22 to include a focus on community resources and immediate needs amid the COVID-19 crisis.

Every day, we're working to find new ways to better serve Texans in Greater Houston and fill needed information gaps. Within our website, we've built out a full resource guide with TX-22 specific materials and our team remains on call to help answer questions.

But today, we want to take our work a step further, and that starts with hearing from you, friend. [**Will you take our April COVID-19 survey to let us know how you 're doing?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/mMc1YKCrE9eAqZs5PMcrQn_3EoU3LlXmZtlYIaknWb0=/pbHatq-e8c-BayFx0QKA7QM7CslTAq44jaLXm7fwYxA=) | **[Take the Survey ➜](https://act.myngp.com/el/mMc1YKCrE9eAqZs5PMcrQn_3EoU3LlXmZtlYIaknWb0=/pbHatq-e8c-BayFx0QKA7QM7CslTAq44jaLXm7fwYxA=)**
---

All responses will be kept completely confidential and anonymous. This survey is designed to help us better triage our efforts and next wave of assistance.

Thank you and stay safe,

Sri

| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/mMc1YKCrE9eAqZs5PMcrQn_3EoU3LlXmZtlYIaknWb0=/pbHatq-e8c-BayFx0QKA7QM7CslTAq44jaLXm7fwYxA=)

**Sri Preston Kulkarni** is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he'll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington. | [Help send Sri to Congress! ➜](https://act.myngp.com/el/mMc1YKCrE9eAqZs5PMcrQn_3EoU3LlXmZtlYIaknWb0=/gLtdVvZQDNRj1u6jA1Q7LvdU33--Aah3SFUJRQ8JAZs=?refcode=Em_footer&amount=15)

* * *

clean_body: As you may have already heard, our campaign recently expanded our work in TX-22 to include a focus on community resources and immediate needs amid the COVID-19 crisis. = | Sri and our entire team hopes you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. Please visit our = to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe. Team, I have a favor to ask. As you may have already heard, our campaign recently expanded our work in TX-22 to include a focus on community resources and immediate needs amid the COVID-19 crisis. Every day, we're working to find new ways to better serve Texans in Greater Houston and fill needed information gaps. Within our website, we've built out a full resource guide with TX-22 specific materials and our team remains on call to help answer questions. But today, we want to take our work a step further, and that starts with hearing from you, friend. = | = All responses will be kept completely confidential and anonymous. This survey is designed to help us better triage our efforts and next wave of assistance. Thank you and stay safe, Sri | = Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he'll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington. | Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at = | Paid for by Sri for Congress SRI FOR CONGRESS P.O. BOX 898 SUGAR LAND, TX 77487-0898 If you wish to no longer receive email from us, please =.

name: Senator Jeff Merkley
subject: You shouldn't have to risk your life to vote.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2e000/6cd27893/54786730/15907501/4180451557/VEsH/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://www.jeffmerkley.com")
---

| | Elections are the core of our democracy. And in this time of crisis and pandemic, it's more critical than ever that the voice of the people is heard. And yet, in Wisconsin today, they're moving forward with an in-person primary election after the Wisconsin Supreme Court overruled the Governor's executive order delaying the election. No doubt, thousands of voters will stay home (as directed by public health authorities) rather than risk their lives by voting. Which, of course, is exactly what Republicans want. They see free and fair elections where everyone votes as a threat. This cannot happen in November. The American people must be fully heard in the election for the presidency, the Senate, and the House of Representatives. **We must move forward with national vote-by-mail to protect our democracy.** [**Sign the petition: urge Congress to pass national vote-by-mail.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2e000/6cd27893/54786730/1590753e/4180451557/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/vote-by-mail/merkley/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2020-04-vote-by-mail-email") As we've seen across America, states are struggling with keeping election schedules and managing risk during this pandemic. **Americans shouldn't have to choose between exercising our constitutional right to vote and putting our health at risk.** Seniors, people with compromised immune systems, people without health care _all_ deserve a voice and a vote, _no matter what_. No one--including our health care workers and first responders--should have to stand in long lines, risking their safety, in order to vote. [**It's proven. It's safe. It's time. Tell Congress to urgently support national vote-by-mail.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2e000/6cd27893/54786730/1590753e/4180451557/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/vote-by-mail/merkley/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2020-04-vote-by-mail-email") **_Jeff_** |
---|---|---

---|---

body:

With the introduction of the Great American Outdoors Act just days ago, Cory is closer than ever before to securing full funding for the Land and Water Conservation Fund and protecting our national parks!
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001z60DcP0RoQhW600QVdZtt1kaFYDQ0LP_80tFBVgC1kumvwfJFq6Qr4RHSyTlbDVthgPU3msUj9VoM-ea0WcciuXMk2MQOjF9EiLWTOv3ts_UXSiYj8VXQQZ77CfkG5mz934PG7u21ZuP5RUy2TtUkd4voxNbNH0vXVTu4DWxZMFk1onW22XTrajHAbcwLzL8hWXxImYMGdPZpf8TEXBWVvqXdXEU7hkrCw8qjc3LBF9f0QGPb3B6NOUZ0tgH0NGR_nKJoXYt7rOmuxFPa0qkU8NrD9cO4R4_9EiHUdECHh5VblgWfU6BaNgJZmmc2O7-FvOjzFNOd8MwWauMBmX0mh23aRbwRfG4CDz1WtgRQl3jGGcwqmioJD2oaW6NtoeDUgCy0b2-Yx1EcnJjE7UK0w==&c=0K_axQA940fV7SBw4Xy7hPMMfWvbEdIcE1lzvc8qtftOp2KqjYzclg==&ch=4m36Q98iMu3kj26QIhZTScEutvANwTAXV2oKgtTaYHAwIhtxyHYaYA==)

With the introduction of the **Great American Outdoors Act just days ago, Cory is closer than ever before to securing full funding for the Land and Water Conservation Fund and protecting our national parks!**

](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001z60DcP0RoQhW600QVdZtt1kaFYDQ0LP_80tFBVgC1kumvwfJFq6Qr4RHSyTlbDVthgPU3msUj9VoM-ea0WcciuXMk2MQOjF9EiLWTOv3ts_UXSiYj8VXQQZ77CfkG5mz934PG7u21ZuP5RUy2TtUkd4voxNbNH0vXVTu4DWxZMFk1onW22XTrajHAbcwLzL8hWXxImYMGdPZpf8TEXBWVvqXdXEU7hkrCw8qjc3LBF9f0QGPb3B6NOUZ0tgH0NGR_nKJoXYt7rOmuxFPa0qkU8NrD9cO4R4_9EiHUdECHh5VblgWfU6BaNgJZmmc2O7-FvOjzFNOd8MwWauMBmX0mh23aRbwRfG4CDz1WtgRQl3jGGcwqmioJD2oaW6NtoeDUgCy0b2-Yx1EcnJjE7UK0w==&c=0K_axQA940fV7SBw4Xy7hPMMfWvbEdIcE1lzvc8qtftOp2KqjYzclg==&ch=4m36Q98iMu3kj26QIhZTScEutvANwTAXV2oKgtTaYHAwIhtxyHYaYA==)** | [**ADD YOUR NAME**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001z60DcP0RoQhW600QVdZtt1kaFYDQ0LP_80tFBVgC1kumvwfJFq6Qr4RHSyTlbDVthgPU3msUj9VoM-ea0WcciuXMk2MQOjF9EiLWTOv3ts_UXSiYj8VXQQZ77CfkG5mz934PG7u21ZuP5RUy2TtUkd4voxNbNH0vXVTu4DWxZMFk1onW22XTrajHAbcwLzL8hWXxImYMGdPZpf8TEXBWVvqXdXEU7hkrCw8qjc3LBF9f0QGPb3B6NOUZ0tgH0NGR_nKJoXYt7rOmuxFPa0qkU8NrD9cO4R4_9EiHUdECHh5VblgWfU6BaNgJZmmc2O7-FvOjzFNOd8MwWauMBmX0mh23aRbwRfG4CDz1WtgRQl3jGGcwqmioJD2oaW6NtoeDUgCy0b2-Yx1EcnJjE7UK0w==&c=0K_axQA940fV7SBw4Xy7hPMMfWvbEdIcE1lzvc8qtftOp2KqjYzclg==&ch=4m36Q98iMu3kj26QIhZTScEutvANwTAXV2oKgtTaYHAwIhtxyHYaYA==)
