name: Tina Smith
subject: Will you sign this card?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
As we all figure out ways to adapt to this new reality, I’m particularly grateful for the time and care our educators are putting in for students everywhere. They have gone above and beyond to make sure our students can keep learning during this public health emergency. You see, our educators not only teach our students, but they mentor, care for, and inspire the next generation of leaders.**We owe them our thanks.** In this time of crisis, these are the folks making difficult adjustments and finding creative ways for our students to keep learning and growing. **[That’s why I’m asking you to sign your name to our card and thank our educators for their leadership and resilience in this moment of crisis:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17001923/181170722/509305684?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjN2ZjNGViNS0xNjc5LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ryddi73XqBHwptt8JR_AnQGCtykFk4-cvLj-l8Pi0Lo=&emci=955af7ae-1679-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=c7fc4eb5-1679-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=6227932)** | [Sign the card](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17001924/181170723/509305684?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjN2ZjNGViNS0xNjc5LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ryddi73XqBHwptt8JR_AnQGCtykFk4-cvLj-l8Pi0Lo=&emci=955af7ae-1679-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=c7fc4eb5-1679-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=6227932)
---
I am so grateful for all that you do for our community — thank you for continuing to fight for our students.
Stay safe.
— Tina

name: Defeat Lindsey Graham
subject: He's attacking Nancy Pelosi!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
---
| | You won't believe what he said!. [](https://go.protectvoting.%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_flipthesenate_april?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200407_GrahamPelosi_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200407_GrahamPelosi_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_200407_GrahamPelosi_U1_X1")
* * *
**Speaker Nancy Pelosi -- one of our HEROES -- has been a strong and vocal truth-teller on the coronavirus for months now.** She's been holding Donald Trump accountable -- saying that Trump's handling of the virus is having "deadly" impacts in America (because it's true!). But Republican Senator Lindsey Graham, one of Donald Trump's most LOYAL supporters, went on FOX News to ATTACK Speaker Pelosi. **There are no two ways about it: Lindsey Graham is a DISGRACE and a TERRIBLE leader!! name: Team Booker
subject: What happened in Wisconsin today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
What we’re seeing today in Wisconsin is voter suppression, plain and simple. But what’s happening in Wisconsin is not isolated.
#
Today in Wisconsin, in-person voting for the presidential primary still carried on despite nationwide stay-at-home orders and warnings from public health officials.
Democrats asked to extend absentee voting or delay the election, but Republicans blocked these demands.
Now there are reports that thousands of people stood in line today (many said social distancing rules were barely enforced) — risking their health — to be able to practice their right to vote.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17005012/181205226/2008580521?source=em20200407-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjE2MTkyNC0yNjc5LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4HCFI8Y-AkQJCwgZn7vAMKtjxKsJmBH_oECSpNUa8w8=&emci=98b92f90-2379-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=0f161924-2679-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=2635570)
[**We believe every single American should be able to vote by mail. Will you sign our rapid response petition demanding Congress to guarantee the right to vote by mail in our upcoming elections?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17005013/181205227/2008580521?source=em20200407-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjE2MTkyNC0yNjc5LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4HCFI8Y-AkQJCwgZn7vAMKtjxKsJmBH_oECSpNUa8w8=&emci=98b92f90-2379-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=0f161924-2679-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=2635570)
****[SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17005014/181205228/2008580521?source=em20200407-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjE2MTkyNC0yNjc5LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4HCFI8Y-AkQJCwgZn7vAMKtjxKsJmBH_oECSpNUa8w8=&emci=98b92f90-2379-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=0f161924-2679-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=2635570)****
Especially nowadays, when staying at home can be the difference between life and death, it should be a no brainer that we all be allowed to vote by mail.
Tragically, this is not the case.
What we’re seeing today in Wisconsin is voter suppression, plain and simple. **But what’s happening in Wisconsin is not isolated. **
Kentucky has for years been one of the most disenfranchised states in the country. Our current Senator Mitch McConnel loves dark money, supports voter suppression, and cares nothing about Voting Rights.
**It’s about time we start treating voting less like a privilege and more like a right.** Especially as our primary and the presidential election approaches, it’s critical we enact measures to make sure no one is forced to choose between their right to vote and their health.
**[Will you sign our petition demanding Congress to pass guarantees that allow all of us to vote by mail? The legitimacy of our democracy and our ability to save as many lives as we can are at stake.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17005015/181205229/2008580521?source=em20200407-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjE2MTkyNC0yNjc5LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4HCFI8Y-AkQJCwgZn7vAMKtjxKsJmBH_oECSpNUa8w8=&emci=98b92f90-2379-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=0f161924-2679-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=2635570)**

body:
Democrat plant has Democrat and Green party members circulating and signing his petitions! | | | Dear Friend,

This, fellow patriot, is why. We. **_Fight_**.

When New Jersey changed the way ballot petitions were collected, I re-tasked my team immediately to comply with the new rules. Thousands of conservatives like yourself stepped up to the plate, delivering the HIGHEST number of signatures of any candidate.

However, our opponent Rikin Mehta, a [Democrat in disguise](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=6258e05967&e=3e017fab0f) and an establishment plant created to protect Cory Booker, broke a ton of rules.

Mehta doesn't want you to know that his campaign is being run by Democrats. Want proof that he's a progressive puppet?

## **His petitions were signed and circulated by Democrats****—****we even found****signatures from****members of the Green Party!**** **

Additionally, he had circulators from outside of New Jersey, another clear violation and more proof that Rikin Mehta does not respect the rule of law.

The New Jersey swamp is trying to buy this primary to protect their shill, Cory Booker. **If this doesn’t get your blood boiling, nothing will.**

## **Consider the Facts: Rikin Mehta...**
* was a DEMOCRAT until recently
* is a property tax CHEAT
* is a D.C. SWAMP insider
* was appointed by D.C.’s PROGRESSIVE Mayor in 2014
* has publicly SUPPORTED OBAMACARE

We weren’t the only ones watching. Another great American named King Penna challenged the **clearly bogus petitions** in a New Jersey court, where an activist judge allowed Rikin Mehta to remain on the ballot despite his numerous violations. It’s clear that games are being played at the highest levels of of the swamp.

Department of State records and emails provided through official open records requests contradict the narrative presented in court and we will investigate this fully.

We always knew the swamp would do anything to protect Booker and now we know how many are complicit.

Democrat controlled political blogs have been forced to stop covering our Press Releases — they’re scared, and they should be. The swamp knows if that I’m the Republican nominee, WE THE PEOPLE will remove Cory Booker from politics.

We’re just getting warmed up and we’re going to win this fight. There’s too much at stake. Please check out our press release below for more details.

As always, thank you for fighting with us.

-Hirsh

| April 6th, 2020
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**

| |
# Democrat Judge allows Rikin Mehta to stay on ballot

**Linwood, NJ** — In a shocking development, a Democrat judge threw out a challenge mounted by conservative New Jersey voter King Penna regarding the eligibility of Rikin Mehta's candidacy.

In a clear violation of New Jersey statutes, a number of signatories who had backed Mehta's nominating petition were found to have belonged to the Democrat Party and even the Green Party. This is consistent with Hirsh Singh's exposé of Mehta as a plant by the progressive establishment in Washington D.C. In a viral video, Hirsh Singh had exposed Mehta's deep connections to the Democrat Party, including Mehta's political appointment by Muriel Bowser, the progressive mayor of Washington D.C.

In fact, Bowser is considered one of the most progressive politicians in the entire history of America, with a history indicating that it is impossible to obtain a political position under her unless one is a committed leftist radical. Penna's objection pointed out that many of those who circulated Mehta's petition and sought signatures were registered Democrats as well.

"The fact that Rikin Mehta depended on the voting base of the Democrat Party and Green Party machinery to get on to the ballot proves that he is a pawn of the progressive establishment," said Hirsh Singh.

Election law experts expected Rikin Mehta to be struck off the ballot following the challenge, but the Democrat judge that came to his rescue sent shockwaves through New Jersey's conservative voters. Many of them expressed frustration and vowed to defeat the leftist establishment's hostile takeover of the New Jersey Republican Party.

Hirsh Singh, who has been a Trump supporter since June 2015, has enjoyed massive support from Republican voters in the state. He applauded the efforts of King Penna and promised to carry on the fight for conservatives.

"It is because of the vigilance of Americans like King Penna that we live in the greatest country in the world today,” says Singh.

“Yet, this Democrat judge's ruling shows that the system is loaded against the people and needs to be fixed. I promise to work to fix this system so that the United States does not deteriorate into a ‘single party democracy’ in the image of China, which is what Green Party extremists would like it to become."
###

name: MJ Hegar
subject: World Health Day [SIGN THE CARD]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Will you take a moment to sign my card thanking our frontline health care heroes for all their hard work, and what they're sacrificing to provide for us?

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489038d/7f51f7bc/4c9f369a/4ef1346d/323557472/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hey Peter,

It's World Health Day -- and I keep thinking about how thankful I am for all the Texas doctors, nurses, and other health care workers who are on the frontlines of the COVID-19 crisis.

They're part of an incredible medical community who protect our lives every day. In the midst of a pandemic, amazing medical professionals in our communities are providing vital care for COVID-19 patients, as well as the many other folks who rely on them.

**Will you take a moment to sign my card thanking our frontline health care heroes for their hard work?** **[**SIGN THE CARD**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489038d/7f51f7bc/4c9f369a/4ef1346c/323557472/VEsE/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-WHDThankYou")** I survived gunfire during my time in the military and went on to have two complicated and life-threatening pregnancies. I know exactly how important quality, affordable health care is to American families. I'm running for office to make sure our health care providers _and_ all Americans have a health care system that WORKS.

[**Sign my card thanking all of our health care providers who are fighting to provide critical healthcare every day in the face of enormous sacrifice.**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489038d/7f51f7bc/4c9f369a/4ef1346c/323557472/VEsF/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-WHDThankYou")

We've all been seeing how important our health care workers are -- let's give them some more love today for what they do every day for us.

\-- MJ

[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489038d/7f51f7bc/4c9f369a/4ef13463/323557472/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExNzcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-healthcare?refcode=email_20200407.2nd__1177__&amount=10&recurring=true")
---

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489038d/7f51f7bc/4c9f369a/4ef13462/323557472/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExNzcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1177&amount=10&recurring=true")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489038d/7f51f7bc/4c9f369a/4ef13461/323557472/VEsA/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

name: Michelle De La Isla
subject: CARES Act
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR KANSAS
body:
Friends,

Last week, the federal government passed the _Coronavirus Aid, Relief and Economic Security (CARES) Act_. On March 28, Governor Laura Kelly issued a statewide Stay-At-Home order in Kansas. On April 1, she signed EO 20-17, which allows Kansas to apply for the dollars available to us through the CARES Act.

Kansans’ lives have changed significantly in recent weeks. There’s a lot of information out there and it can be difficult to keep up with all of the news and updates during this pandemic. Please follow your local news outlets for the most current information about your community. I’m sure that many Kansans in the Second Congressional District - and across the state - have questions about the relief available to them.

Here are three aspects of the CARES Act that may apply to you:
* **Direct payments to individuals:** If you pay taxes, you will receive a one-time direct deposit of up to $1,200. Married couples will receive up to $2,400, plus $500 per child. To qualify, your income must be under $99,000 for individuals, and under $198,000 for married couples. For more information, please visit the IRS website by clicking here - **[Economic Impact Payments](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17006743/181229096/-80128964?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmI4ZTQ4My0zMDc5LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qRZQeOM7dnjZ5XufiwA--NdxHMq5PidgTmHk05zijKw=&emci=939c6c4b-1379-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=86b8e483-3079-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=9593007)**

* **Extended unemployment support:** This legislation expands eligibility and extends unemployment benefits through December 31 for eligible workers. It also offers workers an additional $600 per week until July 31, as well as state benefits. These benefits apply to those that are self-employed, independent contractors, and gig economy workers. If you need to file a claim for unemployment due to COVID-19, please visit the Kansas Department of Labor’s website by clicking here - **[Get Kansas Benefits FAQs](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17006744/181229097/-1327028420?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmI4ZTQ4My0zMDc5LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qRZQeOM7dnjZ5XufiwA--NdxHMq5PidgTmHk05zijKw=&emci=939c6c4b-1379-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=86b8e483-3079-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=9593007)**

* **Strengthening healthcare:** Our hospitals will receive much-needed direct financial support through this legislation, and it will help hospitals be more prepared when COVID-19 peaks in their community. Additionally, all testing and potential vaccines for COVID-19 will be covered at no cost to patients.

I want Kansans to know that help is out there. Elected officials, like myself, are working long hours to design solutions to mitigate the spread of COVID-19. But you don’t have to be an elected official to help. Washing your hands, and staying at home are important actions that we all need to take to flatten the curve. In the meantime, please know additional support is coming.

Take care, and remember -- not only does staying home keep you safe, it keeps your community safe too.

Michelle

View the entire **[CARES Act.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17006745/181229098/977851152?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmI4ZTQ4My0zMDc5LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qRZQeOM7dnjZ5XufiwA--NdxHMq5PidgTmHk05zijKw=&emci=939c6c4b-1379-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=86b8e483-3079-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=9593007)**
###

PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR KANSAS
Michelle for Kansas
PO Box 67101
Topeka, KS 66667

Text 'KANSAS' to 31996 to get updates and stay involved in the campaign.

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/939c6c4b-1379-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8/86b8e483-3079-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmI4ZTQ4My0zMDc5LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qRZQeOM7dnjZ5XufiwA--NdxHMq5PidgTmHk05zijKw=&id=111940568&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com).

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: What you can do on this World Health Day
body:
Amid the global Coronavirus pandemic, it’s a moment to acknowledge the incredible work being done to protect the health and well-being of... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=162da17bf2&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • April 7, 2020
---
| | |
# **What you can do on this World Health Day**

**Today, April 7,** is World Health Day. Amid the global Coronavirus pandemic, it’s a moment to acknowledge the incredible work being done to protect the health and well-being of our fellow Americans.

**As President Trump** writes in his Message for [World Health Day 2020](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ea764b4c14&e=3ee4985eea):
| | _The United States will defeat this invisible enemy. On this World Health Day, Melania and I join a grateful Nation in paying tribute to all of our doctors, nurses, healthcare administrators, researchers, scientists, educators, public health officials, and all of the extraordinary men and women who are helping diagnose, heal, inform, protect, and reassure the American people._ |
---|---|---

**The best way to thank** healthcare workers today is by each of us doing our part to stop this virus. Every American should follow the simple and necessary precautions outlined in [President Trump’s 30-Day Coronavirus Guidelines](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7eb79050c6&e=3ee4985eea).

**Another crucial way** that healthy people can assist is by donating blood—the American Red Cross is facing a dire shortage. If you satisfy the eligibility requirements, the process to donate blood is safe, and your donation is needed now more than ever.

**We’re all in** this fight together. President Trump yesterday described the response as an “all-out military operation”—and he’s right. Thanks to the Army Corps of Engineers, New York City’s Javits Convention Center has been converted into one of the largest hospitals in America. At this moment, the Army Corps of Engineers are building 22 similar field hospitals and alternate care sites across 18 states.

**As of yesterday** , FEMA and the Department of Health and Human Services have distributed 11.7 million N95 respirators, 26.5 million surgical masks, 5.3 million face shields, 4.4 million surgical gowns, and 22.6 million gloves throughout America.

**“W****e have been awe-inspired** by the exceptional courage of the doctors, nurses, EMTs, and healthcare workers who are the soldiers of this war,” President Trump says. “No words can ever express the complete measure of our gratitude for these intrepid heroes.”

**🇺🇸** **🇬🇧** [America’s prayers are with British Prime Minister Boris Johnson](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=90bf4ceee0&e=3ee4985eea)

**More information** : [How you can help in the Coronavirus fight](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9dfcd76af9&e=3ee4985eea)
|
---
|
## **🎬**** Simple steps to make your own face covering**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=13536862f4&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **President Trump** announced updated CDC recommendations last Friday to help families protect themselves from Coronavirus. New studies show that transmission from people without symptoms is a more significant factor than was previously known.

**“In light of these studies,** the CDC is advising the use of non-medical cloth face covering as an additional voluntary public health measure,” the President said. “So it’s voluntary; you don’t have to do it. They suggested [it] for a period of time.”

**To be clear** , the use of face coverings is no replacement for President Trump’s existing [Coronavirus Guidelines](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f209446bb5&e=3ee4985eea). It remains crucial that all Americans continue to practice social distancing and strict personal hygiene in their daily routines.

🎬 **Dr. Birx:** [Here’s why it’s important for every American to stay home!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0469193096&e=3ee4985eea)

The United States will defeat this invisible enemy. On this World Health Day, Melania and I join a grateful Nation in paying tribute to all of our doctors, nurses, healthcare administrators, researchers, scientists, educators, public health officials, and all of the extraordinary men and women who are helping diagnose, heal, inform, protect, and reassure the American people
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **White House Coronavirus Task Force Response Coordinator Dr. Deborah Birx delivers remarks at a Coronavirus briefing** | April 6, 2020
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=afa368eaab&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=930f08bfc0&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=faa0a6e94a)
---

---

New studies show that transmission from people without symptoms is a more significant factor than was previously known. “In light of these studies, the CDC is advising the use of non-medical cloth face covering as an additional voluntary public health measure,” the President said. “So it’s voluntary; you don’t have to do it. They suggested [it] for a period of time.” To be clear , the use of face coverings is no replacement for President Trump’s existing . It remains crucial that all Americans continue to practice social distancing and strict personal hygiene in their daily routines. 🎬 Dr. Birx: The United States will defeat this invisible enemy. On this World Health Day, Melania and I join a grateful Nation in paying tribute to all of our doctors, nurses, healthcare administrators, researchers, scientists, educators, public health officials, and all of the extraordinary men and women who are helping diagnose, heal, inform, protect, and reassure the American people | | Photo of the Day | | White House Coronavirus Task Force Response Coordinator Dr. Deborah Birx delivers remarks at a Coronavirus briefing | April 6, 2020 | | | | | | The White House 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Add your name: Make sure every American can vote safely in a pandemic
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
Voting is the foundation of our democracy. And no one should have to choose between protecting their health and making their voice heard. But with the coronavirus crisis making it dangerous to gather | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257aa/45c30650/1f4bff1da/66e978d9/4145176546/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Voting is the foundation of our democracy.

And no one should have to choose between protecting their health and making their voice heard.

But with the coronavirus crisis making it dangerous to gather in public places, wait in long lines, and touch shared surfaces like voting machines, we need a plan to make sure Americans can vote safely in a pandemic.

That's why today, I'm outlining simple steps that Congress needs to take in its next coronavirus relief package to protect the health and safety of America's voters. Here are a few of them:
* Universal vote by mail in every state
* Online and same-day voter registration so that everyone can make their voice heard
* At least 30 days of early voting and extended voting hours to enhance the safety of in-person voting
* Guarantee that every poll worker is compensated -- and receives hazard pay -- for their work
* Provide at least $4 billion for state and local governments to administer elections and to keep poll workers safe

There's more, but it all comes down to this: **During a pandemic, we need voters to stay safe, but not be silenced. And our leaders -- from Congress to governors and state officials -- need to act _now_ to lay the groundwork for safe and secure elections in November.**

**[Over the coming weeks, we'll be calling on governors, local officials, and the federal government to make sure every American can safely exercise their right to vote. Add your name to join the fight and get more updates on how you can take action.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257aa/45c30650/1f4bff1da/66e978d8/4145176546/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVEwN1BfU0dOX0VMRV9FXzIwMjAwNDA3X1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-wd-protect-elections?source=EMQ07P_SGN_ELE_E_20200407_V1S2_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

We've already seen Republicans use the crisis to accelerate an undemocratic power grab and disenfranchise millions.

Last week, Donald Trump claimed that if we made it easier for more people to vote, "you'd never have a Republican elected in this country again."

And he's just the latest in a string of right-wing politicians who've embraced efforts to make it harder for people to vote -- by closing polling places, purging millions of voters from voting rolls, limiting early voting, and passing restrictive voter identification laws.

But in times of crisis, when people's lives and livelihoods are on the line, it's more important than ever that elected representatives are held accountable. There's no room for partisanship when it comes to protecting the basic machinery of our democracy.

We need to make sure every voter can safely make their voice heard, including by taking these steps:
* Expand online voter registration so it's an option in every state, extend voter registration deadlines as much as practicable, and let any eligible voter register on Election Day.

* Make states provide at least 30 days of early voting to help reduce crowds and maintain access to safe, in-person voting.

* Mail every registered voter a ballot and a postage-paid return envelope. That way, they can safely fill it out at home, send it back in, and participate in our democracy.

* Ban states from purging voter rolls during this pandemic -- unless a voter has come forward and said they want to be removed, or unless there's objective evidence that their registration is out of date. And states must add voters' names back to the rolls if they've already been purged.

* Ensure equal access to the polls -- regardless of race or ethnicity, language, tribal citizenship, or ability. That includes ensuring sufficient and safe polling places on Election Day, providing accessible ballot machines for people with disabilities, expanding voting hours, and allowing people to vote with a sworn statement of identity instead of an ID.

* Provide no less than $4 billion in surge funding to states for election administration, compensate every poll worker (including providing hazard pay), and bolster election security.

By taking these steps -- and more -- we'll ensure elections can proceed safely, securely, and on time.

**Congress needs to act, but governors and state officials must do their part, too -- and as a movement, we'll be calling on them to do just that.

I'll keep up the fight in Washington, but I can't do it alone -- we can only protect our democracy if we fight side by side.

[Sign up now to say you're in this fight.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257aa/45c30650/1f4bff1da/66e978d8/4145176546/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVEwN1BfU0dOX0VMRV9FXzIwMjAwNDA3X1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-wd-protect-elections?source=EMQ07P_SGN_ELE_E_20200407_V1S2_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth
| [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257aa/45c30650/1f4bff1da/66e978d8/4145176546/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVEwN1BfU0dOX0VMRV9FXzIwMjAwNDA3X1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-wd-protect-elections?source=EMQ07P_SGN_ELE_E_20200407_V1S2_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

name: Kamala Harris
subject: Christy Smith needs our help to win her special election on May 12
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter,

Christy Smith is running for Congress in California in an extremely important race.

Before 2018, the seat she's running for had been held by Republicans for 26 years. If she can win this race, it'll prove that Republicans are losing ground not just in California, but in states across the country.

Republicans know this, that's why the NRCC just booked nearly $1 million in TV ads to help her opponent win this seat.

That's six straight weeks of nonstop ads attacking Christy.

She is facing a special election on May 12, which is why we're coming to you today to try and rally support to give her the resources she needs to fight back in the final days of this race.

**Any support you can give would go a long way towards helping her hold this seat, so what do you say?**

**[If you are able, will you split a donation between my campaign and Christy's? With her special election right around the corner, she needs all the help she can get to secure victory.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8bc/29776869/a055e27/569f4a4d/141982108/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MDdfa2FtYWxhY2hyaXN0eS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith_khtandem?refcode=em20_200407_kamalachristy-full")** [DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8bc/29776869/a055e27/569f4a4d/141982108/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MDdfa2FtYWxhY2hyaXN0eS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith_khtandem?refcode=em20_200407_kamalachristy-full") This is the last special election before November, and Christy has already become a top target for Republican special interest groups who want to tip the balance in this race.

They're willing to pump a ton of national special interest money into this race to try and win this seat and take back the House.

That's why we need to have her back because when she wins and we send her to Congress, I know she will be a tireless advocate for the people--not big special interests.

But no one person can win a race this big by themselves. It takes a team--which is why we need your help today.

**If you are able, use the link below to split a donation between my campaign and Christy's today:**

**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith_khtandem?refcode=em20_200407_kamalachristy-full](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8bc/29776869/a055e27/569f4a4d/141982108/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MDdfa2FtYWxhY2hyaXN0eS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith_khtandem?refcode=em20_200407_kamalachristy-full")**

Thanks for showing your support,

\- Kamala |

name: Save =?utf-8?b?TWlubmVzb3Rh4oCZcw==?= Senate Seat
subject: We cannot afford to lose a single Senate seat this year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
_Too many folks are facing financial hardship right now, so if you cannot afford to give today — that’s okay. Just knowing you opened this email in the first place makes us so grateful to have you on the team. Thank you._
* * *
Folks — The Senate is in play. Democrats have expanded the map and major election forecasters are rating key Senate races across the country as “toss-ups.” Just take a look:
* _Sabato’s Crystal Ball_ recently reported that the fight for Senate control **“is getting more competitive, with Democrats pushing the overall map more into toss-up territory.”**

* _Cook Political Report_ said, **“the chances of Democrats taking back the Senate are rising, and is now close to 50-50 odds.”**

* And check out this headline from _Inside Elections:_ **“Over the Last Year, the Size and Scope of the Battlefield Has Evolved, Almost All in Favor of Democrats”**

Democrats only need to flip four seats to take back the Senate — and we’re holding strong in states like Colorado, Arizona, Maine, North Carolina, Montana, and more. But unless we defend our Democratic incumbents like Tina Smith in Minnesota, we have virtually no path to taking back the Senate. **There’s no other way around it, folks — we cannot afford to lose a single Senate seat this year. clean_body: | Too many folks are facing financial hardship right now, so if you cannot afford to give today — that’s okay. Just knowing you opened this email in the first place makes us so grateful to have you on the team. Thank you. Folks — The Senate is in play. Democrats have expanded the map and major election forecasters are rating key Senate races across the country as “toss-ups.” Just take a look: Sabato’s Crystal Ball recently reported that the fight for Senate control “is getting more competitive, with Democrats pushing the overall map more into toss-up territory.” Cook Political Report said, “the chances of Democrats taking back the Senate are rising, and is now close to 50-50 odds.” And check out this headline from Inside Elections: “Over the Last Year, the Size and Scope of the Battlefield Has Evolved, Almost All in Favor of Democrats” Democrats only need to flip four seats to take back the Senate — and we’re holding strong in states like Colorado, Arizona, Maine, North Carolina, Montana, and more. But unless we defend our Democratic incumbents like Tina Smith in Minnesota, we have virtually no path to taking back the Senate. There’s no other way around it, folks — we cannot afford to lose a single Senate seat this year. Chip in $10 or any amount you can afford to help us re-elect Tina Smith, save Minnesota’s Senate seat, and take back the Senate: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for reading. Stay safe out there. — Save Minnesota’s Senate Seat Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Janet=20Barresi?=
subject: Let's talk
body:
I'm opening my schedule to engage with you | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/a78e6b3168cc/calling-all-patriots-12302302?e=795c6d9796)
---
| | [ ](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=0174cf039b&e=795c6d9796)
---
| [Chat With Janet](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=64bf6b12fe&e=795c6d9796 "Chat With Janet")
---
| | Peter,

**Let's talk. **

Needless to say, there's a lot of stress and anxiety right now over the virus and our health, the economy, and just general uncertainty about the future. But Oklahomans are tough and resilient. We'll get through this together -- let's talk about it.

I'm opening my schedule to engage directly with groups, clubs, churches and faith leaders, associations, and businesses across Oklahoma's 5th District in a series of virtual conversations from our homes.

As a practicing dentist for 24 years, I'd be happy to discuss health care concerns amidst the crisis. I also helped run a small oil and gas business for many years, so we can chat about jobs and the economy, the impact on small businesses, government's role at various levels, and regulations.

Or of course we can discuss whatever else is on your mind. **The goal is a conversation** to help us all get through this tough time together.

You can sign up here and give details of your virtual event or scheduling request in the Comment section of the [Contact Us page on our website.](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=709d1dd695&e=795c6d9796)
---
| [Book an Online Conversation](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=6d1ede9e08&e=795c6d9796 "Book an Online Conversation")
---
| Again, if you'd like to schedule a meeting to talk about jobs, small business, the economy, or our shared Oklahoma values, or if you'd like for me to speak virtually with your community group, business or club during this time, or if you'd just like to chat—[please let me know](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=af9a3e9e5e&e=795c6d9796)!

Also, if you're a small business owner, church pastor, small group leader, member of a local rotary club, chamber of commerce or similar, I'd love to get to know you and tell you about our campaign and why I'm running for Congress.

In the meantime, don't forget to check out our new [**Coronavirus Resource Center**.](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=31b6be67fe&e=795c6d9796) We've got information regarding Small Business Association loans, debt relief, donating blood, food banks and other tips for making it through the COVID-19 pandemic.

I'm looking forward to speaking with you!

Best,
\--Janet Barresi
---
| | [Let's Talk: Book Your Chat Now](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=5bd61f48bb&e=795c6d9796 "Let's Talk: Book Your Chat Now")
---

name: Team Warner
subject: Coronavirus and access to health insurance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---
| | Derek --

Our nation is facing a challenging time. Beyond the immediate health threat of the virus itself, we're seeing people grapple with another challenge: access to health care.

**A record number of Americans filed for unemployment last week** , and we could see tens of millions of Americans lose their jobs before social distancing measures end. Short term stimulus measures are a good first step to easing the financial burden of unemployment, but we need to address the health implications as well.

**It boils down to this: people are losing access to health care, and we need to act quickly to make sure that everyone has access to the care they need.**

The Trump administration said they were considering a special ACA enrollment period to allow everyone access to care, but ultimately did not move forward. That's simply not good enough for folks who just lost their health insurance. During a global pandemic, we can't afford to deny people a clear path to vital health care coverage.

**[Sign our petition if you agree that we need a special ACA enrollment session in light of the coronavirus outbreak.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d502/53d9897e/54de9868/1c899c06/1424539895/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-aca")**

Eleven states and the District of Columbia are already moving forward with their own plans for special health insurance enrollment periods to cover their citizens, but we need a nationwide enrollment period to ensure that everyone has the care they need during this difficult time. We need a nationwide ACA special enrollment period.

Protecting the health and safety of Virginians and all Americans has always been a top priority for Mark. In this uncertain time, that means fighting for immediate relief through stimulus packages _**and**_ for the long-term health of our country by ensuring people have access to health insurance. He won't give up the fight -- **[does he have your support?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d502/53d9897e/54de9868/1c899c06/1424539895/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-aca")**

Thank you,

-- Team Warner
---
|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d502/53d9897e/54de9868/1c899c05/1424539895/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

| | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
---

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Just wait for it . . .
body:
Wisconsin moved forward with their primary today.
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-371044-871844-4945579-fecf72537d-daae908e04)
Patriot,

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-371044-871844-4945578-be81a0ecea-daae908e04) Wisconsin moved forward with their primary today.

Extreme precautions were put in place to maintain no-contact voting and social distancing making it safe for voters and election staff and volunteers.

Wisconsin’s “above and beyond” efforts today have proven that we can keep our elections in place during the pandemic.

But it’s not good enough for Democrats.

Ilhan Omar retweeted calls to postpone the election while Bernie Sanders called holding an election “outrageous.”

Why do Democrats want to stall the elections? Because they want the election to take place through absentee mail ballots or worse, online voting.

If that happens, **Democrats will SWEEP the November elections because of one simple thing . . . FRAUD!**

We need to keep our campaign on track and prepare to fight ANY efforts to delay and change the voting methods in November.

[Donate today and help us keep going.](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-371044-871844-4945578-be81a0ecea-daae908e04)

We need to shut down ANY notion of mass absentee voting and we certainly can’t trust online voting.

But to do that, we need to get our campaign back on track immediately.

All campaigns have taken a big hit on fundraising – which is understandable.

Millions of Americans are out of work and we rely on the $20 donations that come from everyday Americans who work hard for a living.

And due to this crisis, many of those Americans are now out of work.

If you’re able, [please help get our campaign back on track with a donation today](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-371044-871844-4945578-be81a0ecea-daae908e04).

The elections will be held in November, and we STILL have to campaign to win.

[Help us get there by donating today.](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-371044-871844-4945578-be81a0ecea-daae908e04)

Thanks so much for all that you do.

Sincerely,

Laura Loomer

P.S. Many waiters, waitresses and restaurant workers supported our campaign. Many would send in their tips from the night which I greatly appreciated. Now they’re out of work through no fault of their own. We owe it to them and all of the other Americans hurt by COVID-19 to work with a passion to get our economy back on track when this passes. [Let me be part of that by sending me to Washington.](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-371044-871844-4945578-be81a0ecea-daae908e04)

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.

LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: COVID-19 and the road ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Indiana has pulled together these last few weeks unlike any other time in our state’s history | | |
---|---|---
Friend,

Indiana’s roads are seeing a lot less traffic these days – and that’s great news. It means Hoosiers are hunkering down, staying at home, and limiting the spread of COVID-19.

_**In fact, we learned today that vehicle traffic is down 40% during the week and over 50% on the weekends!**_

And while we’re not traveling, your Indiana Department of Transportation is out making sure our _**road and bridge projects continue,**_ so that when it is time to hit the road again, it’ll be smooth sailing.

Here are a few ways they’re making that happen:

**Community Crossings Grants**
Community Crossings is the governor’s infrastructure program that assists local communities in the repair, ongoing maintenance, and improvement of their roads and bridges. While Governor Holcomb can’t be in each community to celebrate this year in-person, these local infrastructure **projects will continue as planned.**

_**217 Community Crossing grants** _are being awarded in _**61 counties** **and**_ _**156 cities****and towns...for a total of $126.5 million in matching grants!**_ **[Check here](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=020f828a81154f3db2c2c2acec6f2792&_e=0UuZKFxzNGsRvbY2GPUqcu2XBDpQ48xnmtZp-O63tP26wYCPUAIFHqWX8MCSnb6nfygpDtJc6nuGKtl07Fo7y-e-RweXeuMQeNRqXOyfJE-ElfVYMM2hpuJEpn7WhQp_AZcZA49E3F9Bz92m6aAVwmdFULZQr-lWpSp5mjrjybTMswxiqEi2rzrDLHCUBQYxHKod2BC2fJdjzl_ZdiDKal0-Sr2ai7Vev9bKT_AIdp_G2dQuOC5iZ_lhvBTxayus34_W6VNHFzOnaLnSLqsDfoMfT-mekHDe9-tOLMGAoZZHCp2Hmm_WSjjOQYA7fSWeZ3gqR_K2FaWoq878pF4PzUfyrbmfluDr0aVWnnY5N2ogITXO-0pTaEMqCxct3u0bXN_bkA4kMF2lVb3pyrFvN-_xJkQ1kaWQYwtgNTY-pXUAgDltN7aMt0bBnkK3bQIoZmhP512K-heF3J2-enwm5g%3D%3D) **to see if your county or community has been awarded funds!

**Jumpstarting Road Construction**
With fewer Hoosiers on the road, INDOT is jumpstarting road construction:
* I-70 on the east side of Indianapolis will be closed for major repairs. Originally scheduled to take five months to complete, it _**will now be done in one month.**_
* Section Six of I-69 (between Martinsville and Indianapolis) continues to move forward as scheduled.
* Projects are occurring all over the state, including the Lloyd Expressway in Evansville and I-469 in Fort Wayne.

Remember – for the safety of all Hoosiers, _**travel should only be done when essential.** _Enforcement of Governor Holcomb’s latest order for Hoosiers to hunker down at home goes into effect at midnight tonight. If you have questions about what this means, check out this **[updated list of frequently asked questions.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=020f828a81154f3db2c2c2acec6f2792&_e=0UuZKFxzNGsRvbY2GPUqcsaGVGnc-ZzXyryA1WrEwDFmvdzlVoBrRCcdKDkqDWoZu69utPPB_B8EHy0ZrsyzPFTY48sqRRJ4pGaRT3j2XFshj243cyHTh1wzqBxkovgYwkR6NdwBkWBVhdpnkXJRhduRIL_bVMUzR9avL4_egLSbzG4tIi1AT6shYVCZ1sWk59gkBmWB20t8LCozJjxykm-EzWt2PnQaDhDi5ZEs4U4iZf7gndUrTTf7tt6_83m7IgH60ogT5we0dfqGTkZwRvDVpbvFFAJF87A4NhaulVC0dvqR-NVNfIfa2paMx59HVdZ2K_FiJcqCx94oK62xXV8p8aTl8kmX9Q12wMCbIeW7c0jAJ3sj3JZnFS_UE9eP-OeUajn9JMq5nnykpxqoaw%3D%3D)**

As Governor Holcomb has said, “Indiana has pulled together these last few weeks unlike any other time in our state’s history.” We’re in this together – and together, we’ll come out of this even stronger.

#InThisTogether
-Your Holcomb Crew

name: GOP Corruption Alert
subject: 24 responses needed from Georgia to stop Republican corruption
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
We're missing your response, friend
| | |
---
**This is OUTRAGEOUS, friend: **After a private briefing on the dangers of COVID-19, Senate Republicans - _including our opponent Kelly Loeffler (R-GA)_ - frantically sold off personal stock, making millions for themselves.

**Now, the Department of Justice has launched an OFFICIAL inquiry into their outrageous corruption** - and at least one Senate Republican is under federal investigation for potential insider trading.
We'll be frank: Corruption like this has NO place in our government. But if we don't speak up now to condemn this behavior - and support Democrats who will actually put their constituents ahead of their own bottom line - then Republicans could get away with their crimes.
**That's why we need to hear from another 24 concerned Democrats from Georgia before midnight, but we're still missing your response.** **[If you want to take back the Senate for Democrats and make our government work for the people, not the wealthiest few, please speak out right now:](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "http://surveys.signforgood.com/warnock-anti-corruption?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk130-su-nd") **
